Vargr4ED_36.english: … Isn’t it a natural greed to want to be perfect at everything for the sake of one’s master?
Vargr4ED_36.korean: …주인을 위해서라면 뭐든 완벽해지고 싶다고 생각하는 것은, 응당 가져야 할 욕심이 아니겠나.

Vargr4ED_37.english: Even when I served the Empress in the past, she always praised me on days when I perfectly carried out her orders.
Vargr4ED_37.korean: 과거 여제님을 섬겼을 때도 명령을 완벽하게 수행한 날이면 늘 치하해 주셨다.

Vargr4ED_38.english: … I heard that unlike me, CheonA, Janghwa, and Fafnir received severe corporal punishment, but…
Vargr4ED_38.korean: …나와는 다르게 천아와 장화, 파프니르는 심한 체벌을 받았다는 이야기를 들었지만…

Vargr4ED_39.english: However, receiving the Empress's favor through perfect execution was my happiness and the meaning of my existence.
Vargr4ED_39.korean: 하지만 완벽한 수행으로 여제님의 총애를 받는 것이 나의 행복이자 존재 의의였다.

Vargr4ED_4.english: A normal bioroid would have collapsed from exhaustion long ago…

Vargr4ED_40.english: That… somehow, I feel like the Commander would be very disappointed if he heard it.
Vargr4ED_40.korean: 그거… 왠지 사령관이 들으면 굉장히 실망할 것 같은데.

Vargr4ED_41.english: What are you talking about? I don't understand.

Vargr4ED_42.english: The Empress regarded you only as a favored subordinate, but does the Commander think of you only as a loyal subordinate?
Vargr4ED_42.korean: 여제는 널 총애하는 부하로만 여겼지만, 사령관도 널 충직한 부하로만 생각할까?

Vargr4ED_43.english: I heard the commander told you you would look pretty in a bikini… What kind of superior says something like that to a subordinate?
Vargr4ED_43.korean:
사령관이 너한테 비키니를 입으면 예쁠 것 같다고 했다며…
부하에게 그런 얘기를 하는 상관이 어딨어?

Vargr4ED_44.english: Even though he's been with them for quite a while, Vargr still doesn't understand the Commander's feelings.
Vargr4ED_44.korean: 합류한 지 꽤 됐는데도, 바르그는 사령관의 마음을 아직도 이해 못 하고 있네.

Vargr4ED_45.english: The commander is treating us not as weapons of war, but as his equals. Am I wrong?
Vargr4ED_45.korean: 사령관은 우릴 전쟁 병기가 아니라, 자신과 동등한 존재로 대해주고 있어. 내 말이 틀렸어?

Vargr4ED_47.english: You don't need to feel too much pressure, Vargr. As long as you do your best, the Commander will like you no matter how you look.
Vargr4ED_47.korean: 너무 부담 가질 필요 없어, 바르그. 네가 최선을 다한다면 사령관은 어떤 모습이든지 좋아할 거야.

Vargr4ED_48.english: … Understood. I will keep that in mind.

Vargr4ED_49.english: Ah, wait! Don't move. I told you I'll draw it properly.
Vargr4ED_49.korean: 아, 잠깐만! 움직이지 말아 봐. 내가 제대로 그려준다니까?

Vargr4ED_5.english: If I were exhausted by just this much... I wouldn't have been able to wield Skoll and Hati.
Vargr4ED_5.korean: 겨우 이 정도로 지친다면… 나는 스콜과 하티를 휘두르지도 못했겠지.

Vargr4ED_51.english: After work, while passing by the Empress Hound quarters, I was suddenly captured by Fafnir.
Vargr4ED_51.korean: - 퇴근 후, 나는 엠프레시스 하운드 숙소 근처를 지나치던 중에 별안간 파프니르에게 붙잡혔다.

Vargr4ED_52.english: Fafnir, who had suddenly dragged me to the lodging, abruptly said he would draw me and started drawing in a sketchbook.
Vargr4ED_52.korean: - 갑작스레 숙소로 끌고 온 파프니르는 대뜸, 나를 그려주겠다며 스케치북에 그림을 그리기 시작했다.

Vargr4ED_53.english: … Is there a reason you absolutely have to draw me?

Vargr4ED_54.english: I teased him just a tiny bit with an LRL drawing, and he got angry and told me to draw you by tomorrow.
Vargr4ED_54.korean: 내가 LRL 그림을 가지고 아주 조오오오금…. 놀렸더니, 내일까지 널 그려오라고 화를 내더라고.

Vargr4ED_55.english: But I'm old, you know. Surely I can't draw worse than that little kid, right?
Vargr4ED_55.korean: 그런데 내 나이가 있지. 설마 그 꼬맹이보다 그림을 못 그리겠어?

Vargr4ED_56.english: - … Fafnir took the crayon that Andvari often carried around and started drawing.
Vargr4ED_56.korean: - …파프니르는 안드바리가 자주 들고 다니는 크레용을 들고 그림을 그리기 시작했다.

Vargr4ED_57.english: I'm back… M-Master! What brings you to our lodging so suddenly…
Vargr4ED_57.korean: 다녀왔… 주, 주인님! 갑작스레 저희 숙소에 어쩐 일로…

Vargr4ED_58.english: Ah... because Fafnir said he wanted to draw me...
Vargr4ED_58.korean: 아… 파프니르가 날 그리고 싶다고 해서…

Vargr4ED_59.english: You mean a drawing…? Fafnir isn’t the type to know how to draw…
Vargr4ED_59.korean: 그림… 말입니까? 파프니르는 뭘 그릴 줄 아는 애가 아닌데…

Vargr4ED_6.english: I tried following along for just a moment, and my arms and legs already feel weak. How on earth can someone dog paddle for hours...?
Vargr4ED_6.korean:
잠깐 따라 해봤는데도 벌써 팔다리가 풀리는 거 같아.
대체 어떻게 하면 개헤엄을 몇 시간 동안 할 수 있지…?

Vargr4ED_60.english: What are you talking about! I'm really good at drawing!
Vargr4ED_60.korean: 무슨 소리야! 나 그림 엄청 잘 그려!

Vargr4ED_62.english: Come to think of it, I've heard that even a slug has its talents. Well then, may I take a look?
Vargr4ED_62.korean: 하긴, 굼벵이도 구르는 재주가 있다고 들었다. 그럼 내가 한 번 봐도 되나?

Vargr4ED_64.english: It looks similar to the picture I saw in that room when I dealt with the elder who betrayed the Empress and sided with Angel in the past.
Vargr4ED_64.korean: 예전에 여제님을 배신하고 앙헬 쪽에 붙은 장로를 처리했을 때, 그 방에서 본 그림과 비슷하군.

Vargr4ED_65.english: … Humans before the apocalypse called this style of art abstraction. To think you would portray Master so creatively. You have truly remarkable skill, Fafnir.
Vargr4ED_65.korean:
…이런 미술 양식을 멸망 전 인간들은 추상화라고 불렀지.
주인님을 이렇게 창의적으로 표현할 줄이야.
정말 대단한 실력이다, 파프니르.

Vargr4ED_67.english: Where are you looking right now? That’s… the background of our accommodation.
Vargr4ED_67.korean: 지금 어딜 보는 거야? 그건… 우리 숙소 배경이잖아.

Vargr4ED_68.english: Huh? Isn't this part your eyes, nose, and mouth, Master?
Vargr4ED_68.korean: 응? 이 부분이 주인님의 눈, 코, 입이지 않느냐.

Vargr4ED_69.english: That… it’s a wardrobe, a bed… and a table…! Eeeeeek!! How can you not even tell that apart!
Vargr4ED_69.korean:
그거… 옷장이랑 침대랑… 테이블이라고…!
이이이이익!! 어떻게 너는 그런 것도 구분을 못 해!

Vargr4ED_7.english: I think it will be difficult unless you have basic stamina like Cerberus.
Vargr4ED_7.korean: 켈베로스 같이 기본 체력이 받쳐주지 않는 이상은 힘들 것 같아.

Vargr4ED_70.english: I pulled a chair and approached the sketchbook where Fafnir was drawing.
Vargr4ED_70.korean: - 나는 의자를 끌고 파프니르가 그림을 그리던 스케치북 쪽으로 다가갔다.

Vargr4ED_71.english: Wow, you drew that well. Anyone can tell it's an accommodation.
Vargr4ED_71.korean: 와, 잘 그렸네. 누가 봐도 숙소야.

Vargr4ED_72.english: Right? Right? Ahahahaha, this is me! As expected, Vargr is such an idiot that he can't even understand my drawings!
Vargr4ED_72.korean:
그렇지? 그렇지? 아하하하하 이게 나라고!
역시 바르그는 내 그림을 이해 못 할 정도로 바보야!

Vargr4ED_73.english: What is this here? There is something long drawn in the middle of this circle and branches.
Vargr4ED_73.korean: 여기 이건 뭐야? 이 동그라미랑 나뭇가지들 가운데 뭔가 길쭉한 게 그려져 있는데.

Vargr4ED_74.english: That's your face and body. That long thing is your front tail. How is it? I drew it well, right?
Vargr4ED_74.korean: 그건 네 얼굴이랑, 몸이야. 길쭉한 그건 앞 꼬리고. 어때, 잘 그렸지?

Vargr4ED_75.english: … Uh, yeah. It's detailed. You drew it well…

Vargr4ED_76.english: Strangely, it's hard to say anything to Fafnir. Is it because he feels like the youngest sibling who gets scolded by CheonA, Janghwa, and Vargr...?
Vargr4ED_76.korean:
- 이상하게 파프니르한테는 뭐라고 하기가 어렵다.
천아랑 장화, 바르그한테 야단맞는 막내 느낌이라서 그런가…

Vargr4ED_77.english: Master, it is good that you care for Fafnir, but if you keep saying only pleasant things, this fool's bad habits will get worse.
Vargr4ED_77.korean:
주인님, 파프니르를 아끼시는 건 좋지만,
자꾸 듣기 좋은 말씀만 하시면 이 바보의 버릇이 나빠집니다.

Vargr4ED_78.english: Eeeeeeeek!! I'm not stupid!! Stop teasing me!!
Vargr4ED_78.korean: 이이이이이익!! 나 바보 아냐!! 그만 놀려!!

Vargr4ED_79.english: Why is calling a fool a fool considered teasing? Then is it okay to say someone is dim-witted or stupid?
Vargr4ED_79.korean:
바보한테 바보라고 부르는 게 왜 놀리는 거지?
그럼 아둔하다, 우둔하다고 말하면 괜찮나?

Vargr4ED_8.english: Wait a minute, Vargr. Could we try swimming differently? By stretching out our arms like this…
Vargr4ED_8.korean: 잠깐만 바르그. 혹시 다르게 수영해 볼 수 있을까? 이렇게 팔을 뻗어서…

Vargr4ED_80.english: Dull? That's a good word, right? Yeah. The rump meat is delicious.
Vargr4ED_80.korean: 우둔하다? 그거 좋은 말 맞지? 그래. 우둔살이 맛있지.

Vargr4ED_81.english: smiled awkwardly and stroked Fafnir's head. Vargr looked up at me quietly, even while glaring at me with complete displeasure.
Vargr4ED_81.korean:
- 나는 어색하게 웃으며 파프니르의 머리를 쓰다듬어주었다.
바르그는 영 못마땅하게 쏘아 보면서도, 나를 가만히 올려다보았다.

Vargr4ED_82.english: Vargr, do you have something to say?

Vargr4ED_83.english: … I always feel it, but… Master is infinitely generous and broad-minded.
Vargr4ED_83.korean: …늘 느끼고 있지만… 주인님은 한없이 관대하시고 아량이 넓으십니다.

Vargr4ED_85.english: Of course I don't dislike it…!

Vargr4ED_87.english: I, Vargr, simply have a strong desire to repay you, even if just a little.
Vargr4ED_87.korean: 이 바르그, 조금이라도 보답드리고 싶은 마음이 클 뿐입니다.

Vargr4ED_88.english: Vargr… do you happen to have something to tell me?
Vargr4ED_88.korean: 바르그… 혹시 나한테 할 말 있어?

Vargr4ED_89.english: met Vargr's eye level and gazed intently.
Vargr4ED_89.korean: - 나는 바르그와 눈높이를 맞추고 지긋이 바라보았다.

Vargr4ED_90.english: H-What do you mean, something to say! No... ! Nothing...

Vargr4ED_91.english: Anyone can tell he looks troubled... but since he shows no signs of opening up, I think I should back down.
Vargr4ED_91.korean: - 누가 봐도 고민이 많은 얼굴 같아 보이는데… 털어놓을 기미가 없어 보이니 물러서야 할 듯싶다.

Vargr4ED_92.english: Vargr, you've been looking really busy lately working part-time at Cafe Horizon and even promoting the shrine.
Vargr4ED_92.korean: 바르그, 요즘에 카페 호라이즌에서 알바하면서 신사까지 홍보하느라 무척 바빠 보이던데.

Vargr4ED_93.english: I was about to tell you to rest, but I was relieved to see that you submitted a vacation request.
Vargr4ED_93.korean: 좀 쉬라고 하려다, 휴가 신청서를 낸 거 보고 안심했어.

Vargr4ED_94.english: The thing is... the team members around me told me to go have some fun... so I had no choice but to take a vacation.
Vargr4ED_94.korean: 그게… 주변 대원들이 조금이라도 놀고 오라는 통에… 어쩔 수 없이 휴가를 냈습니다.

Vargr4ED_95.english: Good job. This is exactly when you should use your vacation.

Vargr4ED_96.english: Huh? Vargr, are you on vacation? I'm so jealous... I don't have anything left...
Vargr4ED_96.korean: 어? 바르그, 너 휴가야? 부럽다… 난 남은 거 없는데…

Vargr4ED_97.english: Didn't I tell you repeatedly? Use your vacation wisely. You have no right to be envious, having squandered your time like water.
Vargr4ED_97.korean:
내가 누누이 말하지 않았나? 휴가는 신중하게 쓰라고.
물 쓰듯이 휴가를 탕진한 너는 부러워할 자격도 없다.

Vargr4ED_99.english: Oh, by the way, I'm planning to go somewhere far away for this vacation, so have Janghwa and CheonA clean the accommodation thoroughly.
Vargr4ED_99.korean: 참, 이번 휴가는 먼 곳으로 갈 생각이니, 장화와 천아를 시켜 숙소 청소를 잘해놓도록.

Vargr5ED_1.english: In preparation for the upcoming summer, I stopped by the Svalbard Islands to inspect the facilities of Aqua Land, which had hardly been in operation.
Vargr5ED_1.korean:
- 다가올 여름을 대비해, 거의 가동하지 않았던 
아쿠아 랜드의 시설을 점검하기 위해 스발바르 제도에 들렸다.

Vargr5ED_10.english: Ah, I just remembered this after hearing that the Commander has arrived. I just submitted it, but you will still approve it, right?
Vargr5ED_10.korean: 아, 사령관님이 도착했다는 이야기를 듣고 생각나서요. 방금 올렸지만, 그래도 결재해 주실거죠?

Vargr5ED_100.english: think the doggy paddle Vargr showed was cuter and better.
Vargr5ED_100.korean: 난 바르그가 보여줬던 개헤엄이 더 귀엽고 좋은데.

Vargr5ED_101.english: Vargr, will you go diving for me?

Vargr5ED_102.english: It seems like more training is needed. What do you think, Vargr?
Vargr5ED_102.korean: 교육이 더 필요한 것 같은데, 바르그 생각은 어때?

Vargr5ED_11.english: Sigh... Okay. I understand. I'll check later.

Vargr5ED_12.english: But seeing that you even came wearing a swimsuit, it looks like Azaz is planning to play at Aqua Land too?
Vargr5ED_12.korean: 그런데 수영복까지 입고 온 걸 보니, 아자즈도 아쿠아 랜드에서 놀 생각인가 보네?

Vargr5ED_13.english: Having spent all my time in the workshop, coming here made me want to work while enjoying myself.
Vargr5ED_13.korean: 공방에서만 지내다, 이곳에 오니까 즐기면서 일하고 싶더라고요.

Vargr5ED_14.english: Anyway, Commander, judging by the look in your eyes, it seems like you still want to touch it...
Vargr5ED_14.korean: 그나저나 사령관, 눈빛을 보니 여전히 만져보고 싶어 하는 것 같은데…

Vargr5ED_15.english: How is it? Would you like to touch it?

Vargr5ED_17.english: That's a shame. Since I only showed this bikini at first, I decided to pretend I didn't notice if you touched it today.
Vargr5ED_17.korean:
아쉽네요. 이 비키니를 처음에는 보여주기만 했으니, 
오늘은 직접 만져도 모르는 척하기로 했는데.

Vargr5ED_19.english: Okay. I'm a night owl, so I actually like it. Then let's continue when it gets dark.
Vargr5ED_19.korean: 알겠어요. 전 야행성이니까 오히려 좋아요. 그럼 어두워지면 그때 더 진행하도록 하죠.

Vargr5ED_21.english: Oh, right. Instead of touching it then, it might be a good idea to try putting it in.
Vargr5ED_21.korean: 아 참. 그땐 만지지 말고, 넣어보는 것도 좋겠네요.

Vargr5ED_23.english: I'll be going now. I have something urgent to do, so I'll be leaving.

Vargr5ED_24.english: After Azaz disappeared leaving a bombshell, three members who had signed up to volunteer as lifeguards this summer came to visit.
Vargr5ED_24.korean:
- 아자즈가 폭탄 발언을 남기고 사라진 뒤,
이번 여름부터 라이프가드로 봉사활동을 신청한 세 명의 대원이 찾아왔다.

Vargr5ED_26.english: What? You're not wearing a swimsuit?

Vargr5ED_27.english: I didn't come here to play. I'm just going to look around, so I didn't bother wearing it.
Vargr5ED_27.korean: 놀러 온 게 아니잖아. 주변을 둘러보기만 할 거라서 굳이 입고 오진 않았어.

Vargr5ED_28.english: … I shouldn't have used waterproof makeup…

Vargr5ED_29.english: Dione is always pretty when she's engrossed in her work, even without makeup, isn't she?
Vargr5ED_29.korean: 화장하지 않아도 일에 열중하고 있는 디오네는 언제나 예쁜걸?

Vargr5ED_30.english: While chatting amicably like that, we looked around the quiet Aqua Land.
Vargr5ED_30.korean: - 그렇게 화기애애하게 이야기를 나누면서도, 한산한 아쿠아 랜드를 둘러보았다.

Vargr5ED_31.english: - Vargr must have taken time off to come here, too. I wonder where he is...?
Vargr5ED_31.korean: - 바르그도 휴가를 내고 여기에 왔을 텐데, 어디에 있으려나…?

Vargr5ED_32.english: Watson, why have you been looking around so much for a while?
Vargr5ED_32.korean: 왓슨, 아까부터 왜 그렇게 주변을 두리번거려?

Vargr5ED_33.english: Ah, I was wondering if Vargr had come...

Vargr5ED_34.english: I thought that if Vargr were to get a tan, I might take a moment to apply some oil for him.
Vargr5ED_34.korean: - 혹시 바르그가 태닝을 한다면 잠시 시간을 내서, 오일이라도 발라줄까 싶었다.

Vargr5ED_35.english: As for Vargr, I saw him at the wave pool earlier.

Vargr5ED_36.english: What? You said Vargr went into the water?

Vargr5ED_37.english: Come to think of it… I recently found a bikini that I think would suit Vargr well. I even subtly mentioned that he would look cute if he tried it on…
Vargr5ED_37.korean:
- 그러고 보니… 얼마 전에 바르그한테 잘 어울릴 것 같은 비키니를 발견했다. 
넌지시 입어보면 귀여울 것 같다는 이야기까지 했었는데…

Vargr5ED_38.english: - No way, is Vargr really wearing a swimsuit and playing in the water?
Vargr5ED_38.korean: - 설마, 바르그가 정말 수영복을 입고, 물놀이하고 있는 걸까?

Vargr5ED_39.english: Ah, there he is. The Commander?

Vargr5ED_4.english: Didn't you see my name written as the person in charge of facility inspection?
Vargr5ED_4.korean: 시설 점검 책임자에 제 이름이 적혀있는 거, 못 보셨어요?

Vargr5ED_40.english: Followed the hand the serpent pointed to.

Vargr5ED_41.english: Sunlight shattered brightly through the windowpane, and the clear water surface below sparkled with a transparent light.
Vargr5ED_41.korean: - 유리창 안으로 환하게 부서지는 햇살, 아래 청량한 수면이 투명한 빛을 반짝였다.

Vargr5ED_42.english: And while riding a tube floating elegantly above it, a lovely puppy smiled at me.
Vargr5ED_42.korean: - 그리고 그 위를 고고히 떠다니는 튜브를 탄 채, 사랑스러운 강아지가 나를 향해 웃어 보였다.

Vargr5ED_43.english: I was momentarily mesmerized by his beautiful and cute appearance, but then I realized that Vargr's tube was floating on the deep surface of the water.
Vargr5ED_43.korean: - 아름답고 귀여운 자태에 넋을 나간 것도 잠시, 바르그의 튜브가 깊은 수면 위에 떠 있음을 알았다.

Vargr5ED_44.english: My worry that I might be swept away by the waves and drift deep down was short-lived.
Vargr5ED_44.korean: - 혹시 파도에 휩쓸려서 깊은 곳까지 떠내려갈까, 걱정했던 것도 잠시.

Vargr5ED_45.english: - Vargr jumped into the water in one go.

Vargr5ED_46.english: Forgetting to take off my clothes, I hurriedly jumped into the water and swam toward where Vargr had sunk.
Vargr5ED_46.korean: - 나는 옷을 벗는 것도 잊은 채 황급히 물에 뛰어들어, 바르그가 가라앉은 곳을 향해 헤엄쳐갔다.

Vargr5ED_47.english: But Vargr, who peeked his head out of the water…
Vargr5ED_47.korean: - 하지만 물 위로 고개를 빼꼼 내민 바르그는…

Vargr5ED_48.english: - It approached me while skillfully dog-padding.

Vargr5ED_49.english: After letting out a sigh of relief and soothing my startled heart, I hugged Vargr.
Vargr5ED_49.korean: - 나는 안도의 한숨을 쉰 후, 놀란 가슴을 달래며 바르그를 끌어안았다.

Vargr5ED_50.english: I'm sorry, Master... I wanted to swim a bit more stylishly.
Vargr5ED_50.korean: 죄송합니다, 주인님… 좀 더 멋있게 헤엄치고 싶었는데.

Vargr5ED_51.english: I'm not used to swimming yet...

Vargr5ED_52.english: Vargr stared at me intently, then hugged me tightly and continued speaking.
Vargr5ED_52.korean: - 바르그는 나를 빤히 바라보다, 이내 나를 꼭 끌어안은 후 말을 이어갔다.

Vargr5ED_53.english: When I first came to Aqua Land… I considered swimming a meaningless activity and rudely snapped at them. However, after joining Orca, I gradually started to have things I wanted to do and things I wanted to impress my Master.
Vargr5ED_53.korean:
제가 처음 아쿠아 랜드에 왔을 때… 수영이 무의미한 행위라 여기고 무례하게 쏘아붙였지요.​
오르카에 합류한 이후에는 점차 하고 싶은 것, 주인님께 잘 보이고 싶은 것들이 생겼습니다.

Vargr5ED_54.english: The reason I wore this bikini was partly because I wanted to look pretty for my Master, but also because I really wanted to show you that I can now swim freely without anyone's help.
Vargr5ED_54.korean:
이 비키니를 입은 이유는 주인님께 예쁘게 보이고 싶은 욕심도 있었지만…​
이젠 누구의 도움 없이도 자유롭게 수영하는 모습을 꼭 보여드리고 싶었기 때문입니다.

Vargr5ED_55.english: It seems Vargr, who usually avoids going into the water, practiced swimming hard because of my comment that a bikini would suit him.
Vargr5ED_55.korean: - 비키니가 어울릴 것 같다는 내 한마디 때문에, 평소 물에 들어가는 것을 꺼리는 바르그가 수영 연습을 열심히 했나 보다.

Vargr5ED_56.english: … I’m not yet skilled enough to swim long distances. However, even if it means doing this… I wanted to show you, Master, how I’ve changed.
Vargr5ED_56.korean:
…아직 장거리까지 헤엄칠 정도로 실력이 좋진 않습니다.​
하지만, 이렇게 해서라도… 주인님께 달라진 제 모습을 보여드리고 싶었습니다.

Vargr5ED_57.english: … Although, unlike the other Orca members, my swimming skills are incredibly rough and clumsy, and even in a swimsuit, my figure isn't very satisfactory in the Master's eyes,
Vargr5ED_57.korean:
…비록 다른 오르카 대원들과 다르게 투박하고 서툴기 그지없는 수영 실력이고,​
수영복을 입은 모습도 주인님이 보시기엔 그리 만족스럽지 않은 몸매지만,

Vargr5ED_58.english: I am so happy right now, seeing you look at me, smile, and hug me, Master. This must be your love, wider and deeper than the oceans of the world, right...?
Vargr5ED_58.korean:
주인님이 절 보고 웃어 주시고 안아주시는 지금이 너무 행복합니다.​
이것이 온 세상의 바다보다 넓고 깊은, 주인님의 사랑이겠지요…?

Vargr5ED_59.english: Badara… I felt a bit awkward, thinking Vargr might be exaggerating for no reason, but…
Vargr5ED_59.korean: - 바다라… 괜스레 바르그가 과장하는 것 같아 머쓱해졌지만…

Vargr5ED_6.english: I was surprised again, thinking you were making something without a plan.
Vargr5ED_6.korean: 또 기획안 없이 뭘 만드는 줄 알고 깜짝 놀랐잖아.

Vargr5ED_60.english: I comforted Vargr, who must have worked tirelessly to show me a changed version of himself.
Vargr5ED_60.korean: - 내게 달라진 모습을 보여주기 위해, 피나는 노력을 했을 바르그를 다독여주었다.

Vargr5ED_61.english: I am embarrassed because I haven't learned to swim perfectly yet... I will practice more next time and show you a great performance. I will become Vargr, your hunting dog who swims freely even in the vast ocean that is you!
Vargr5ED_61.korean:
아직 수영을 완벽하게 배우지 못해서 부끄럽습니다… 다음에는 더 연습해서 멋진 모습을 보여드리겠습니다.​
주인님이라는 넓은 바다에서도 자유롭게 헤엄치는 주인님만의 사냥개… 바르그가 되겠습니다!

Vargr5ED_62.english: When I laughed, Vargr laughed along, but soon flapped his ears as if embarrassed.
Vargr5ED_62.korean: - 내가 웃자, 바르그는 따라 웃다가도 이내 부끄러운 듯 귀를 펄럭였다.

Vargr5ED_63.english: I slowly lifted Vargr up like a princess.
Vargr5ED_63.korean: - 나는 천천히 바르그를 공주님처럼 안아 올렸다.

Vargr5ED_64.english: As if he had read my laughter, Vargr answered while burying his face in his bosom.
Vargr5ED_64.korean: - 내 웃음을 읽었는지, 바르그는 품에 얼굴을 묻으며 대답했다.

Vargr5ED_65.english: … Please teach me, Master. I want to know every way I can reach your heart. It is alright if I am out of breath to the point where my heart feels like it will burst. It is alright if my limbs go numb to the point where I cannot move.
Vargr5ED_65.korean:
…가르쳐주세요, 주인님. 제가 주인님의 마음에 닿을 수 있는 모든 방법을 알고 싶습니다.​
심장이 터질 정도로 숨이 차도 좋습니다. 움직일 수 없을 만큼 팔다리가 저려도 좋습니다.

Vargr5ED_66.english: Vargr answered my joke in a whisper.

Vargr5ED_67.english: Love... Hehe... I am truly curious about what kind of place it is, Master. I will surely remember it. Tonight, I will throw my whole body there. My Master, I truly love you.
Vargr5ED_67.korean:
사랑해라… 후후… 어떤 곳인지 정말 궁금하군요, 주인님.​
꼭 기억하겠습니다. 오늘 밤, 그곳에 제 온몸을 내던지겠습니다. 저의 주인님, 정말 사랑합니다.

Vargr5ED_68.english: ...I should have proceeded with the inspection, but first, I decided to spend some quality time with the lovely seal that learned to swim for me.
Vargr5ED_68.korean: - …원래라면 점검을 진행해야겠지만 그보다 먼저, 나를 위해 수영을 배워온 사랑스러운 물개와 다정한 시간을 보내기로 했다.

Vargr5ED_69.english: Hey, Vargr. I heard you're good at swimming now! Really?
Vargr5ED_69.korean: 야, 바르그. 너 이제 수영 잘한다며! 진짜야?

Vargr5ED_7.english: Oh, haven't you seen the proposal?

Vargr5ED_70.english: Is doggy paddling really swimming? It's just a pet dog goofing around and splashing in the water.
Vargr5ED_70.korean: 개헤엄이 무슨 수영이냐? 그냥 반려 강아지가 헤실거리면서 물장구치는 거지~

Vargr5ED_72.english: Fafnir, why don't you try learning to swim while you're at it? … It was more manageable than I thought.
Vargr5ED_72.korean:
파프니르, 이참에 너도 수영을 배워보는 건 어떠냐.
…생각보다는 할 만했다.

Vargr5ED_73.english: Bullshit. I heard they didn't swim in the pool... they swam on top of the commander all night?
Vargr5ED_73.korean: 지랄. 내가 듣기론 풀장에서 수영한 게 아니라… 밤새 사령관 위에서 헤엄쳤다던데?

Vargr5ED_75.english: Enough with the small talk, I’m going to check if the cleaning was done properly during my vacation.
Vargr5ED_75.korean: 잡담은 그만하고, 내 휴가 동안 청소를 제대로 했는지 확인하겠다.

Vargr5ED_76.english: After the sweet holiday with Vargr was over, when I called out to Vargr when I ran into him in the hallway, her ears perked up.
Vargr5ED_76.korean:
- 바르그와의 달콤했던 휴일이 지난 후,
복도에서 마주친 바르그를 부르자, 그녀의 귀가 쫑긋했다.

Vargr5ED_78.english: … I am still lacking, but I will learn systematic swimming from the lifeguards so that I can at least float freely on the water.
Vargr5ED_78.korean:
…아직 부족하지만 적어도 물 위를 자유롭게 뜰 수 있는 만큼,
라이프가드 대원들에게 체계적인 수영을 배우겠습니다.

Vargr5ED_79.english: After smiling as if to encourage the shy Vargr, I bent down and opened my arms to him.
Vargr5ED_79.korean:
- 부끄러워하는 바르그에게 용기를 불어넣어 주듯 미소를 지은 후,
나는 몸을 굽혀 바르그에게 두 팔을 벌렸다.

Vargr5ED_80.english: Master... I am ashamed... in front of the unit members...

Vargr5ED_81.english: Stop acting all coy, you little brat. It doesn't suit you.
Vargr5ED_81.korean: 내숭 좀 부리지 마, 똥개. 안 어울리니까.

Vargr5ED_82.english: You little rascal. Your owner is calling, so hurry up and go wag your tail!
Vargr5ED_82.korean: 똥강아지. 주인이 부르는데, 얼른 가서 꼬리 살랑거려야지~

Vargr5ED_83.english: Oh, are you two swimming together again this time? I want to watch, too!
Vargr5ED_83.korean: 오, 이번에도 둘이서 수영하는 거야? 나도 구경할래!

Vargr5ED_84.english: ...You idiot, Nir. Try having some situational awareness, will you?

Vargr5ED_87.english: Vargr, with a bright smile, ran over and dove into my arms.
Vargr5ED_87.korean: - 환한 미소를 지은 바르그가 달려와서 내 품으로 다이빙했다.

Vargr5ED_88.english: A cute and lovely seal splashed into my heart.
Vargr5ED_88.korean: - 내 마음속으로 귀엽고 사랑스러운 물개가 풍덩, 뛰어들었다.

Vargr5ED_9.english: There was nothing there the last time I checked the panel… Could it be, Azaz…?
Vargr5ED_9.korean: 마지막으로 패널을 확인했을 때는 아무것도 없었는데… 설마, 아자즈…?

Vargr5ED_90.english: Vargr! Wait a minute… I think it’s a bit dangerous right now.
Vargr5ED_90.korean: 바르그! 잠깐만… 지금 좀 위험한 것 같은데?

Vargr5ED_93.english: I thought Vargr would never swim in his life…
Vargr5ED_93.korean: 난 바르그가 평생 수영을 안 할 줄 알았는데…

Vargr5ED_94.english: You were really good. You were like a haughty seal.

Vargr5ED_95.english: Vargr is already my cool wolf.

Vargr5ED_96.english: But I can't just let the crime of startling me slide. It seems like he needs more education. What do you think, Varg?
Vargr5ED_96.korean: 하지만 날 놀라게 한 죄는 그냥 넘어갈 수 없지.

Vargr5ED_97.english: Okay, I'll teach you. There's a place called "I Love You" that's wider than all the oceans on Earth. Shall we go there together and practice?
Vargr5ED_97.korean: 지구의 모든 바다보다도 넓은, 사랑해… 라는 곳이 있는데 같이 가서 연습해 볼까?

Vargr5ED_99.english: The way it swam was really cute.

shidenmissorka1ED_10.english: Oh! The Magical Momo combo used by the Lord has landed!
shidenmissorka1ED_10.korean: 오오! 주공께서 쓰시는 매지컬 모모의 콤보가 들어갔습니다!

shidenmissorka1ED_100.english: Wouldn't it be better if you took the initiative to entice them first?
shidenmissorka1ED_100.korean: 초대님께서 먼저 유혹하시는 편이 좋지 않을까요?

shidenmissorka1ED_101.english: Th-that...! I'm too embarrassed to do it!!
shidenmissorka1ED_101.korean: 그, 그런 걸 어떻게…! 나는 부끄러워서 못 하겠소!!

shidenmissorka1ED_102.english: Besides… when I think of the people of the past, there are times when I feel a little afraid. Even though the kid should be fine…
shidenmissorka1ED_102.korean:
게다가… 예전의 인간들을 떠올리면, 가끔 두려워질 때가 있소.
분명 애송이는 다를 터인데도 말이오…

shidenmissorka1ED_104.english: Lord, perhaps you are not making the suggestion first because you know how you feel.
shidenmissorka1ED_104.korean: 어쩌면 주공께서도 초대님의 마음을 알고 계시니, 먼저 권하지 않으시는 걸지도 모르겠네요.

shidenmissorka1ED_108.english: There's no way I'd lose straight through, right?

shidenmissorka1ED_114.english: I just wrote *The Alcohol of Time Sprint*!

shidenmissorka1ED_118.english: No using spells from now on...

shidenmissorka1ED_12.english: Hmph…! You’re pretty good… You brat…

shidenmissorka1ED_123.english: No, I got too worked up too. Sorry.
shidenmissorka1ED_123.korean: 아냐, 나도 너무 열을 올렸어. 미안.

shidenmissorka1ED_124.english: Yeah. Thanks. Let's do it again.

shidenmissorka1ED_13.english: I was currently participating in the Steel Line Fighter tournament that was suddenly held at the Kunoichi's lodgings.
shidenmissorka1ED_13.korean: - 나는 지금 쿠노이치들의 숙소에서 갑작스럽게 열리게 된 스틸라인 파이터 대회에 참가하고 있었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_14.english: - For your information, this is the final match, and the next person to win is the champion.
shidenmissorka1ED_14.korean: - 참고로 이건 결승전이고, 다음에 이기는 사람이 우승이다.

shidenmissorka1ED_15.english: At first, I thought that one of the three of us—Zero, Kaen, or myself—who were familiar with Steel Line Fighter would make it to the finals.
shidenmissorka1ED_15.korean: - 처음에는 스틸라인 파이터에 익숙한 제로와 카엔, 그리고 나 셋 중 하나가 결승까지 올라올 거라 생각했다.

shidenmissorka1ED_16.english: However, a huge dark horse emerged here.

shidenmissorka1ED_18.english: After coming to Orca, perhaps because she fully enjoyed the entertainment available here, her gaming skills had also improved significantly.
shidenmissorka1ED_18.korean: - 그녀는 오르카에 온 뒤, 한동안 오락을 한껏 즐긴 덕분인지 게임 실력 또한 크게 늘어 있었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_19.english: I never imagined Master would improve his skills to this extent…
shidenmissorka1ED_19.korean: 스승님께서 설마 이 정도로 실력을 끌어올리셨을 줄이야…

shidenmissorka1ED_20.english: Game time… is… exactly the same as Kaen’s…

shidenmissorka1ED_21.english: After all, he is the founder of the Murasaki-ryu. Isn't it only natural that he delves into everything to the extreme?
shidenmissorka1ED_21.korean: 무라사키류의 시조이니 말이오. 무엇이든 극한까지 파고드는 것은 당연한 일 아니겠소.

shidenmissorka1ED_22.english: - Actually, the match just a moment ago was also quite dangerous.
shidenmissorka1ED_22.korean: - 실제로 조금 전 경기 역시 꽤나 위험했다.

shidenmissorka1ED_23.english: Since the Leprechaun used by Shiden was a character I knew very well, I was able to respond to its movements somehow.
shidenmissorka1ED_23.korean: - 시덴이 사용한 레프리콘은 내가 무척 잘 아는 캐릭터였기에, 어떻게든 움직임에 대응할 수 있었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_24.english: Now, next is the final round. This will decide everything.
shidenmissorka1ED_24.korean: - 자, 이제 다음은 파이널 라운드. 이걸로 모든 게 결정된다.

shidenmissorka1ED_25.english: I won't fall for that trick again!
shidenmissorka1ED_25.korean: 아까와 같은 수법에 더는 당하지 않겠소!

shidenmissorka1ED_26.english: Tens of seconds passed after the game started.

shidenmissorka1ED_27.english: After exchanging attacks while testing the waters, their stamina ran out, and now the match was in a situation where a super special move... no, just one combo would decide the outcome.
shidenmissorka1ED_27.korean: - 서로 간을 보며 공격을 주고받은 끝에 체력은 바닥을 드러냈고, 이제 초필살기… 아니, 원콤보만 들어가도 승부가 갈릴 상황이 되었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_28.english: Magical Momo, the character you are using, is a character recently added via DLC who wields the Staff of the Magic God. She is a close-range character capable of long-range harassment, but her mid-range skills are weak.
shidenmissorka1ED_28.korean: 주공께서 사용하고 계신 매지컬 모모는 최근 DLC로 추가된, 마법신의 스태프를 사용하는 캐릭터입니다. 장거리 견제는 가능하지만 중거리 기술이 빈약한 근거리형 캐릭터지요.

shidenmissorka1ED_29.english: On the other hand, the Leprechaun that Master handles is a character that can attack reliably from any distance… Then this is…
shidenmissorka1ED_29.korean: 반면 스승님께서 다루시는 레프리콘은 모든 거리에서 안정적으로 공격할 수 있는 캐릭터… 그렇다면 이건…

shidenmissorka1ED_30.english: Yeah... approaching... is difficult... Master... Yuri...

shidenmissorka1ED_31.english: Zero and Kaen are coldly predicting my defeat.
shidenmissorka1ED_31.korean: - 제로와 카엔이 냉정하게 내 패배를 점치고 있다.

shidenmissorka1ED_32.english: That is correct. I will take the victory just like this, you brat!
shidenmissorka1ED_32.korean: 그렇소. 이대로 이 몸이 승리를 가져가겠소, 애송이!

shidenmissorka1ED_33.english: Shiden stepped back to maintain distance.
shidenmissorka1ED_33.korean: - 시덴이 거리를 유지하기 위해 뒤로 물러났다.

shidenmissorka1ED_34.english: I, who had been waiting only for this very moment, inserted the command.
shidenmissorka1ED_34.korean: - 바로 이 순간만을 기다리고 있던 나는 커맨드를 밀어 넣었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_35.english: - Momo's ultimate move, "Magical Shining White Smoke Thrust," is a technique that instantly closes the distance with the opponent!
shidenmissorka1ED_35.korean: - 모모의 초필살기 《매지컬 샤이닝 백연 찌르기》는 상대와의 거리를 단숨에 좁히는 기술이다!

shidenmissorka1ED_37.english: Ugh…! I can’t… be defeated… here…!

shidenmissorka1ED_38.english: Momo on the screen aims her sword and charges at the Leprechaun…!
shidenmissorka1ED_38.korean: - 화면 속에서 모모가 칼을 겨누고 레프리콘에게 돌격한다…!

shidenmissorka1ED_41.english: Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot!
shidenmissorka1ED_41.korean: 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫!  핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫! 핫!  핫!

shidenmissorka1ED_42.english: (This is unbelievable… You guarded my Momo’s White Flame Thrust with perfect timing and height…!?)
shidenmissorka1ED_42.korean: (말도 안 돼… 내 모모의 백연 찌르기를, 정확한 타이밍과 높이로 전부 막았다고…!?)

shidenmissorka1ED_43.english: - Immediately after using her ultimate move, Momo, having failed the attack, fell into a deep stun.
shidenmissorka1ED_43.korean: - 초필살기를 사용한 직후, 공격에 실패한 모모는 큰 경직에 빠졌고.

shidenmissorka1ED_44.english: Shiden's Leprechaun didn't miss the opening and landed a super special move.
shidenmissorka1ED_44.korean: - 시덴의 레프리콘은 그 틈을 놓치지 않고 초필살기를 꽂아 넣었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_47.english: Phew... That was a good fight, kid.

shidenmissorka1ED_48.english: I don't understand what you're saying.

shidenmissorka1ED_49.english: Shiden turned his head sharply and feigned ignorance.
shidenmissorka1ED_49.korean: - 시덴은 고개를 홱 돌리며 시치미를 뗐다.

shidenmissorka1ED_50.english: Master, even so, that was not mature just now...
shidenmissorka1ED_50.korean: 스승님, 방금 그건 정말로 어른스럽지 못하셨습니다…

shidenmissorka1ED_52.english: I didn't explicitly state that using spells is a foul. Wouldn't it be better to set that rule in advance next time?
shidenmissorka1ED_52.korean: 술법 사용을 반칙이라 정해 두지는 않았으니 말이지. 다음부터는 미리 정해 두는 편이 좋을지도.

shidenmissorka1ED_53.english: It is the way of a ninja to do anything to win.
shidenmissorka1ED_53.korean: 그리고 이기기 위해서라면 무엇이든 하는 것이 닌자라오.

shidenmissorka1ED_57.english: (No matter what anyone says, that was a foul, and I think it was Shiden's childish behavior. But…)
shidenmissorka1ED_57.korean: (누가 뭐래도 지금 건 반칙이고, 시덴의 철없는 행동이라고 생각한다. 하지만…)

shidenmissorka1ED_58.english: (If this were a real battle, I wouldn't be able to be complaining like that…)
shidenmissorka1ED_58.korean: (만약 이게 현실 전투였다면, 그런 불평이나 하고 있을 수는 없겠지…)

shidenmissorka1ED_59.english: (Let's acknowledge Shiden's victory here. Because I am the commander!)
shidenmissorka1ED_59.korean: (오늘은 시덴의 승리를 인정하자. 왜냐하면 나는 쿨한 사령관이니까!)

shidenmissorka1ED_60.english: Oh, indeed it is the Lord! What incredible generosity you possess!
shidenmissorka1ED_60.korean: 오오, 역시 주공이십니다! 이 얼마나 너그러우신 아량에 깊이 감복했습니다!

shidenmissorka1ED_61.english: Lord... I... like that about you...

shidenmissorka1ED_62.english: Zero and Kaen said that and hugged me from both sides.
shidenmissorka1ED_62.korean: - 제로와 카엔이 그렇게 말하며 양옆에서 나를 끌어안았다.

shidenmissorka1ED_64.english: Ah, that's unfair! I was going to say it first!
shidenmissorka1ED_64.korean: 아, 언니 치사해요! 제가 먼저 말하려고 했는데!

shidenmissorka1ED_67.english: Suddenly, I realized that Shiden was silently staring at me.
shidenmissorka1ED_67.korean: - 문득, 시덴이 말없이 이쪽을 바라보고 있다는 걸 깨달았다.

shidenmissorka1ED_68.english: You can't do that, Master! My sister and I will comfort you together today!
shidenmissorka1ED_68.korean: 스승님은 안 됩니다! 오늘은 언니와 제가 둘이서 위로해 드릴 테니까요!

shidenmissorka1ED_69.english: Yeah... I made the Lord cry... Banned from participating...
shidenmissorka1ED_69.korean: 응... 주공, 울었어… 반칙... 참가, 금지...

shidenmissorka1ED_70.english: Ugh... I wouldn't do such a thing!
shidenmissorka1ED_70.korean: 읏… 이 몸은 그런 짓 안 하오!

shidenmissorka1ED_72.english: Um... I was a bit immature, too. I'm sorry.
shidenmissorka1ED_72.korean: 그… 이 몸이 조금 철이 없었소. 미안하오.

shidenmissorka1ED_73.english: Let's just consider us like children and end it here.
shidenmissorka1ED_73.korean: 서로 아이 같았던 것으로 치고, 이쯤에서 끝내는 편이 좋겠소.

shidenmissorka1ED_74.english: More importantly, you guys have a mock battle training with the Horde tomorrow, so don't go too overboard.
shidenmissorka1ED_74.korean: 그보다 그대들, 내일은 호드와 모의전 훈련이 있으니… 오늘 밤에 너무 격하게 하지는 마시오.

shidenmissorka1ED_77.english: Then, I will return to my room first.
shidenmissorka1ED_77.korean: 그럼, 이 몸은 먼저 방으로 돌아가겠소.

shidenmissorka1ED_79.english: Oh my, Invitation? Is the game tournament over?

shidenmissorka1ED_8.english: If something like that happened to me now…!

shidenmissorka1ED_80.english: Ah, Ouka... Hmm, it ended with me winning.
shidenmissorka1ED_80.korean:
아, 오우카…
음, 이 몸이 우승하면서 끝났소.

shidenmissorka1ED_83.english: You look a bit gloomy for that.

shidenmissorka1ED_85.english: Is this the Duke of Zhou's business?

shidenmissorka1ED_87.english: Hehe, I can see it. These days, whenever you look at the Lord, you have the face of a young girl.
shidenmissorka1ED_87.korean:
후후, 그럼요. 다 보인답니다.
요즘 초대님께서는 주공을 보고 계실 때면 소녀 같은 얼굴을 하고 계시니까요.

shidenmissorka1ED_89.english: Is it that easy to understand?

shidenmissorka1ED_9.english: I shouted that and pushed the command into the controller.
shidenmissorka1ED_9.korean: - 나는 그렇게 외치며 컨트롤러에 커맨드를 밀어 넣었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_92.english: Yes, I also came to Orca and spent a lot of time with that brat.
shidenmissorka1ED_92.korean: 그래, 이 몸도 오르카에 와서 애송이와 많은 시간을 보냈소.

shidenmissorka1ED_93.english: It would actually be rarer to spend time with that guy and not fall for him...
shidenmissorka1ED_93.korean: 그 녀석과 함께 지내면서 반하지 않는 쪽이 오히려 드물겠지…

shidenmissorka1ED_94.english: I want to move a little further forward with this kid… That’s what I’m thinking…
shidenmissorka1ED_94.korean: 애송이와… 조금 더 친해지고 싶다… 그렇게 생각하고 있소…

shidenmissorka1ED_95.english: Oh my... I didn't expect you to be that honest...
shidenmissorka1ED_95.korean: 어머나… 그렇게까지 솔직히 말씀하실 줄은 몰랐네요…

shidenmissorka1ED_96.english: I merely stated the facts… but…

shidenmissorka1ED_97.english: That little brat... he never tries to seduce me first.
shidenmissorka1ED_97.korean: 그 애송이 녀석… 먼저 유혹해 오질 않는단 말이지.

shidenmissorka1ED_98.english: How on earth do you all end up... sleeping together?
shidenmissorka1ED_98.korean: 다들 대체 어떻게 그… 동침까지 하게 되는 것이오?

shidenmissorka2ED_1.english: The next day, the forest training ground.

shidenmissorka2ED_10.english: Ahaha... The Horde fights in a way where the standard tactics don't really work either, so I'm not exactly in a position to criticize them...
shidenmissorka2ED_10.korean: 아하하… 호드도 원래 전투의 정석이 잘 통하지 않는 방식으로 싸우다 보니, 남 말할 처지는 아니지만요…

shidenmissorka2ED_11.english: That really feels exactly like it…

shidenmissorka2ED_12.english: The reason why actions outside the book are effective is that they only work against an opponent who moves according to the book.
shidenmissorka2ED_12.korean: 정석 밖의 행동이 유효한 건, 정석대로 움직이는 상대에게만 통하는 법이니까요.

shidenmissorka2ED_13.english: Kunoichi, you should come up with countermeasures for when you encounter opponents like them in the future.
shidenmissorka2ED_13.korean: 앞으로 쿠노이치 분들 같은 상대와 만났을 때를 고려한 대책도 생각해 둬야겠어요.

shidenmissorka2ED_15.english: What's wrong, Feather? With that serious look on your face...
shidenmissorka2ED_15.korean: 왜 그래, 페더? 그렇게 심각한 표정으로…

shidenmissorka2ED_17.english: No, Kheshig has grown into such a reliable kid before I knew it, so that's a bit...
shidenmissorka2ED_17.korean: 아뇨, 케시크가 어느새 이렇게 듬직한 아이가 되어 버렸나 싶어서, 그게 좀…

shidenmissorka2ED_18.english: Why? Are you afraid you'll be removed from your position as adjutant?

shidenmissorka2ED_2.english: With this, the mock battle with the Kunoichi team is over.

shidenmissorka2ED_20.english: Th-that can't be true, Talon Feather!
shidenmissorka2ED_20.korean: 그, 그럴 리 없어요, 탈론페더 씨!

shidenmissorka2ED_21.english: There is no way I would become Captain Khan's adjutant when I have Talon Feather!
shidenmissorka2ED_21.korean: 탈론페더 씨가 있는데, 감히 제가 칸 대장님의 부관이 될 리가 없잖아요!

shidenmissorka2ED_22.english: No, actually, just thinking about what it would be like to become Captain Khan's adjutant... well, it really brings back a lot of memories!
shidenmissorka2ED_22.korean: 아니, 케시크가 칸 대장님의 부관이 된다면 어떨지 생각해 보니까… 은근히 기대돼서요!

shidenmissorka2ED_23.english: I guess you could say it's twice as fun to watch that way... Hehehe...
shidenmissorka2ED_23.korean: 그건 그거대로 지켜보는 재미가 두 배는 넘지 않을까… 으헤헤…

shidenmissorka2ED_26.english: It was a good experience. Thank you.

shidenmissorka2ED_27.english: No, that is what I should be saying.
shidenmissorka2ED_27.korean: 그건 오히려 이쪽이 해야 할 말이오.

shidenmissorka2ED_28.english: It seems that they hadn't faced ninja-style fighting before we arrived, so it must have been a good stimulus for Ouka and the disciples.
shidenmissorka2ED_28.korean: 우리들이 오기 전까지 닌자와 맞붙을 일은 없었던 모양이니, 오우카나 제자들에게도 좋은 자극이 되었을 것이오.

shidenmissorka2ED_29.english: Furthermore… your movements are extraordinary. Facing a monster like you has been excellent training for me as well.
shidenmissorka2ED_29.korean:
게다가… 그대의 움직임은 예사롭지 않소.
그대 같은 괴물을 상대하는 일은 이 몸에게도 훌륭한 수련이 되었소.

shidenmissorka2ED_3.english: Thank you all for your hard work!

shidenmissorka2ED_30.english: Even though its performance is restricted, honestly, this is the first time a bioroid has responded even when using the "Time Speed Technique."
shidenmissorka2ED_30.korean: 성능에 제약이 걸린 상태라고는 하나, 《시간 질주의 술》에 대응할 수 있는 바이오로이드는 솔직히 처음 봤소.

shidenmissorka2ED_31.english: Is that so? That is an honor. However, there are still many strong kids in Orca. If you get the chance, you should try a mock battle at least once.
shidenmissorka2ED_31.korean:
그런가. 그건 영광이군. 하지만 아직 오르카에는 강한 이들이 많이 있다.
기회가 된다면 그들과도 한 번쯤은 모의전을 해 보는 게 좋을 거다.

shidenmissorka2ED_32.english: I see. I will do so.

shidenmissorka2ED_33.english: But before that, I would like to have a one-on-one match with you someday.
shidenmissorka2ED_33.korean: 허나 그보다 먼저, 언젠가 그대와 일대일로 겨뤄 보고 싶소.

shidenmissorka2ED_34.english: Me too. I'm counting on you.

shidenmissorka2ED_37.english: Can I get ready to head back now? I'm starving!
shidenmissorka2ED_37.korean: 슬슬 돌아갈 준비 해도 돼? 배고파 죽겠어~

shidenmissorka2ED_38.english: Alright. I'll pack up right away.

shidenmissorka2ED_40.english: Oh, good job, Shiden! You're quite a tough guy. I'll make sure you get a real knockout next time.
shidenmissorka2ED_40.korean:
오, 시덴도 수고! 너 꽤 만만치 않더라.
다음엔 제대로 깨갱거리게 만들어 줄 거야.

shidenmissorka2ED_41.english: Hehe, I'll be looking forward to it.

shidenmissorka2ED_43.english: Is it like that even when you're being completely humiliated by the commander?
shidenmissorka2ED_43.korean: 사령관한테 꼬리를 잔뜩 만져질 때도 그래?

shidenmissorka2ED_47.english: What do you mean by that?

shidenmissorka2ED_49.english: Ah, you haven't done it with the Commander yet? I naturally assumed you had already. Sorry, sorry!
shidenmissorka2ED_49.korean:
엇, 설마 사령관이랑 아직이야? 난 당연히 벌써 진도 뺀 줄 알았는데.
미안, 미안!

shidenmissorka2ED_5.english: They said it was training designed for combat against special bioroids… but it was much harder than I thought…
shidenmissorka2ED_5.korean: 특수한 바이오로이드와의 전투를 상정한 훈련이라더니… 생각보다 훨씬 힘들었어…

shidenmissorka2ED_50.english: … I trust the youngster, but… I haven’t done such a thing yet…
shidenmissorka2ED_50.korean: …애송이를 신뢰하고 있다만… 그, 그런 행위는 하지 않았소…

shidenmissorka2ED_51.english: You haven't even touched the tail yet?

shidenmissorka2ED_52.english: Of course... But why have you been saying "tail, tail" since earlier?
shidenmissorka2ED_52.korean: 물론이오… 그런데 그대는 어찌하여 아까부터 자꾸 꼬리, 꼬리 하는 것이오?

shidenmissorka2ED_53.english: Huh? Because the commander is a total tail maniac.
shidenmissorka2ED_53.korean: 어? 왜냐면 사령관은 완전 꼬리 마니아잖아.

shidenmissorka2ED_54.english: You're saying he's a total tail addict who throws all manners aside to pet a tail whenever he sees one?
shidenmissorka2ED_54.korean: 꼬리만 보였다 하면 체면도 안 차리고 만져대는, 꼬리 중독자라고?

shidenmissorka2ED_55.english: But the fact that it hasn't been touched yet... doesn't that mean it's being cherished a lot?
shidenmissorka2ED_55.korean: 그런데도 시덴의 꼬리를 아직 만지지 않았다는 건…… 엄청 소중히 여기고 있다는 뜻 아냐?

shidenmissorka2ED_58.english: Oh? What's up? You don't look like you dislike it that much, though.
shidenmissorka2ED_58.korean: 오? 뭐야 뭐야~? 아주 싫지만도 않은 표정인데?

shidenmissorka2ED_59.english: If that's the case, just go for it like a gyaru! You might end up going straight to bed. If you get her drunk, it's practically guaranteed.
shidenmissorka2ED_59.korean:
그럴 거면 차라리 갸루답게 확 들이대~!
바로 침대로 점프할 수도 있을걸. 훗훗, 술까지 먹이면 거의 확정이고.

shidenmissorka2ED_6.english: Yes, that is why I planned this training session with the Kunoichi.
shidenmissorka2ED_6.korean: 네, 그래서 이번에 쿠노이치 여러분과의 훈련을 계획한 거예요.

shidenmissorka2ED_60.english: Even if I tell you to act like a gyaru, it’s easier said than done…
shidenmissorka2ED_60.korean: 갸루답게 하라 해도, 말처럼 쉬운 일이 아니오…

shidenmissorka2ED_61.english: That's just how gyaru are, right? Making the first move and completely devouring the other person.
shidenmissorka2ED_61.korean:
갸루는 원래 그런 거잖아?
자기 쪽에서 먼저 들이대고, 홀랑 잡아먹어 버리는 거.

shidenmissorka2ED_63.english: War Wolf, stop it. Isn't Shiden having trouble too?
shidenmissorka2ED_63.korean: 워울프, 그쯤 해 둬라. 시덴이 곤란해하고 있지 않나.

shidenmissorka2ED_64.english: Ehhh! But still, the Commander really liked it when the Captain dressed up as a gyaru before, didn't he?
shidenmissorka2ED_64.korean: 에이~! 그래도 전에 대장이 갸루 차림 했을 때, 사령관 엄청 좋아했잖아?

shidenmissorka2ED_67.english: What do you mean it was just the outfit?

shidenmissorka2ED_68.english: You kept sticking close to me, calling me "senior, senior" and "oppa, oppa."
shidenmissorka2ED_68.korean: 계속 옆에 붙어서 선배~ 선배, 오빠~ 오빠~ 그랬으면서.

shidenmissorka2ED_7.english: Because the Horde's fighting style, where everyone adapts to the flow created by Captain Khan and War Wolf, basically doesn't work.
shidenmissorka2ED_7.korean: 칸 대장님과 워울프 씨가 만드는 흐름에 각자 맞춰 가는, 그런 호드의 일방적인 전투 방식은 기본적으로 통하지 않으니까요.

shidenmissorka2ED_70.english: See? So, Shiden, who is a gyaru with a tail and tiger ears, is the strongest.
shidenmissorka2ED_70.korean: 것 봐? 그러니까 갸루인 데다, 꼬리랑 호랑이 귀까지 달린 시덴은 최강이란 말이지.

shidenmissorka2ED_72.english: Well, I'll give it some thought.

shidenmissorka2ED_8.english: If we try to follow the Captain, they all gang up to crush him, and if we try to move freely, they attack as if to isolate us...
shidenmissorka2ED_8.korean: 대장님을 따라가려 하면 다 같이 대장님을 짓뭉개러 들고, 자유롭게 움직이려 하면 우리를 고립시키듯 공격해 오고…

shidenmissorka2ED_9.english: I was really at a loss because the standard tactics of combat didn't work.
shidenmissorka2ED_9.korean: 전투의 정석이 통하지 않아서 정말 곤란했다니까.

shidenmissorka3ED_100.english: Ah, it looks like they're ready too! Let's join them!
shidenmissorka3ED_100.korean: 아, 저쪽도 준비가 된 모양이에요! 우리도 합류하죠!

shidenmissorka3ED_103.english: Then I will prepare the costume. Please look forward to it.
shidenmissorka3ED_103.korean: 그럼 저는 의상을 만들어 두겠습니다. 기대하고 계세요.

shidenmissorka3ED_104.english: Hehehe! I'll leave it to you, Ms. Audrey!

shidenmissorka3ED_13.english: Ahem... So, Shiden wants to act like a gyaru and actively appeal to her older brother, but...
shidenmissorka3ED_13.korean: 흠흠… 그러니까 지금 손님은 갸루답게 적극적으로 오빠한테 어필하고 싶지만…

shidenmissorka3ED_14.english: The setting is simply that Shiden became a gyaru because she admired them. And the reason she became a gyaru is just that she "referenced the gyaru style popular at the time when she transformed into a younger version," so you're saying she doesn't really have a strong attachment to it, right?
shidenmissorka3ED_14.korean: 지금 시덴 씨의 갸루 모습은 ‘회춘할 때, 당시 유행하던 갸루 스타일을 참고했다.’ 는 덴세츠의 설정 때문이라서, 막상 갸루에 대해 그렇게까지 관심이 있었던 건 아니란 말이죠?

shidenmissorka3ED_15.english: So that means you actually don't have much knowledge about Gyaru, right?
shidenmissorka3ED_15.korean: 그렇다는 건 사실상, 갸루에 대해서는 잘 모른다는 거네요?

shidenmissorka3ED_17.english: … But Orangeade, you are here as if it were the most natural thing in the world?
shidenmissorka3ED_17.korean: …그보다 오렌지에이드, 그대는 너무도 당연하다는 듯이 여기 있구려?

shidenmissorka3ED_18.english: Hehehe! I was being taken care of by BoRyeon until just a moment ago! Then I heard something interesting, so I ended up butting in without realizing it! I'm sorry!
shidenmissorka3ED_18.korean: 에헤헤! 조금 전까지 보련한테 관리받고 있었거든요! 그러다가 흥미로운 이야기가 들려서, 저도 모르게 끼어들어 버렸어요! 죄송해요!

shidenmissorka3ED_19.english: Ah, BoRyeon! My skin has become so plump and bouncy! Thank you! You're the best!
shidenmissorka3ED_19.korean: 아, 보련! 피부 완전히 탱글탱글해졌어요! 감사합니다! 최고예요!

shidenmissorka3ED_20.english: Hehe! I'm glad to see you seem satisfied!

shidenmissorka3ED_21.english: So, what do you think? Can you turn me into a true gyaru?
shidenmissorka3ED_21.korean: 그래서, 어떻소? 이 몸을 진정한 갸루로 만들어 줄 수 있겠소?

shidenmissorka3ED_23.english: To be honest, I'm not exactly sure what a true gyaru is... but I could really feel how much Shiden-san loves my brother!
shidenmissorka3ED_23.korean:
솔직히 말하면, 진정한 갸루가 정확히 어떤 건지는 저도 잘 모르겠어요…
하지만 손님께서 오빠를 정말 좋아한다는 마음만큼은 잘 알겠어요!

shidenmissorka3ED_24.korean: 그러니까…... 네! 제가 최선을 다해서 도와드릴게요!

shidenmissorka3ED_25.english: I want to teach Shiden-san the 'gyaru' style I envision!
shidenmissorka3ED_25.korean: 손님께 제가 생각하는 갸루를 전수해 드리고 싶어요!

shidenmissorka3ED_27.english: Shiden! Please let me help with that story too!
shidenmissorka3ED_27.korean: 시덴 씨! 저도 도와드리게 해 주세요!

shidenmissorka3ED_29.english: Please just consider this an apology I overheard! Besides, having heard such a great story, there is no way I wouldn't cooperate!
shidenmissorka3ED_29.korean: 멋대로 엿들은 사과라고 생각해 주세요! 게다가 그렇게 멋진 이야기를 들었는데, 협력하지 않을 리가 없잖아요!

shidenmissorka3ED_31.english: Then, let's start by changing our outfits! If we look like the perfect Gyaru, our mood will surely be boosted!
shidenmissorka3ED_31.korean:
그럼 우선 옷차림부터 바꿔 보죠!
겉모습이 완벽한 갸루가 되면, 분명 기분도 엄청나게 업될 테니까요!

shidenmissorka3ED_33.english: Hey, I’ve thought of something good! BoRyeon! Lend me your ear for a moment!
shidenmissorka3ED_33.korean: 저, 좋은 거 떠올렸어요! 보련! 잠깐 귀 좀 빌려주세요!

shidenmissorka3ED_39.english: Then, Mr. Orangeade, please take care of that side!
shidenmissorka3ED_39.korean: 그럼 오렌지에이드 씨는 그쪽을 맡아 주세요!

shidenmissorka3ED_4.english: Hehehe~! Of course! Because I enjoy working every day~! Did you come for a massage again today?
shidenmissorka3ED_4.korean:
에헤헤~! 당연하죠! 매일 즐겁게 일하고 있으니까요~!
오늘도 마사지 받으러 오셨어요?

shidenmissorka3ED_41.english: Then right away! I'll be back!

shidenmissorka3ED_45.english: I see. I certainly didn't perceive Shiden as a gyaru.
shidenmissorka3ED_45.korean: 그렇군요. 확실히 저는 시덴 씨를 갸루라고 인식하지 않았어요.

shidenmissorka3ED_46.english: Even though her face and accessories are so gyaru-esque... to think I, the one in charge of Orca's fashion, didn't notice...
shidenmissorka3ED_46.korean: 페이스도 데코레이션도 이렇게나 갸루스러운데… 오르카의 패션을 담당하는 제가 그걸 눈치채지 못하다니…

shidenmissorka3ED_49.english: It’s that bad… If it were the old me, I would have noticed it in an instant…
shidenmissorka3ED_49.korean: 그 정도예요… 예전의 저였다면 한순간에 알아챘을 텐데…

shidenmissorka3ED_5.english: No. I came today because I have something to discuss.
shidenmissorka3ED_5.korean: 아니오. 오늘은 상담할 일이 있어 왔소.

shidenmissorka3ED_50.english: This and that, it's all my sisters' fault for dumping the work on me and disappearing...
shidenmissorka3ED_50.korean: 이건 전부… 매번 일을 저한테 떠넘겨 놓고 사라지는 마이 시스터즈 탓이죠…

shidenmissorka3ED_51.english: I disappeared in the middle of work again today...
shidenmissorka3ED_51.korean: 오늘도 작업 도중에 사라져 버려서… 빠드득!

shidenmissorka3ED_52.english: You are going through a lot of hardship, too...

shidenmissorka3ED_53.english: No, it happens all the time... so I've gotten used to it now. Though it is something I shouldn't get used to... Hehehe...
shidenmissorka3ED_53.korean:
후우~ 아뇨, 매일 있는 일이라… 이제는 익숙해졌어요.
익숙해져서는 안 되는 일이긴 합니다만… 후후후…

shidenmissorka3ED_55.english: Ah, this won't do. Let's get back to the main point.
shidenmissorka3ED_55.korean:
아, 이러면 안 되겠군요.
본론으로 돌아가죠.

shidenmissorka3ED_56.english: You were talking about turning Shiden into a gyaru, right?

shidenmissorka3ED_57.english: I think BoRyeon's idea will be more important than mine for this.
shidenmissorka3ED_57.korean: 이건 저보다도 보련 양의 아이디어가 중요할 것 같네요.

shidenmissorka3ED_58.english: BoRyeon, first, let's combine existing outfits to refine Shiden's gyaru image.
shidenmissorka3ED_58.korean: 보련 양, 우선 기존 의상을 조합해서 시덴 씨의 갸루 이미지를 다듬어 나가 봅시다.

shidenmissorka3ED_60.english: I’m going with an outfit that perfectly captures the tiger ear and tiger tail!
shidenmissorka3ED_60.korean: 타이거 이어 앤 타이거 테일을 퍼펙~트하게 살린 코디로 가겠습니다!

shidenmissorka3ED_63.english: It's perfect... Let's go with this silhouette.

shidenmissorka3ED_64.english: Now, if I just make an outfit that perfectly matches this image…
shidenmissorka3ED_64.korean: 이제 제가 이 이미지에 퍼펙~트하게 어울리는 의상을 만들기만 하면…

shidenmissorka3ED_65.english: The ultimate Tiger Gyaru is complete!

shidenmissorka3ED_66.english: The ultimate... isn't that a bit too much...?

shidenmissorka3ED_67.english: What are you talking about! She's totally a gyaru! I'm telling you, she's seriously super cute!
shidenmissorka3ED_67.korean: 무슨 소리예요! 엄청 갸루예요! 진짜 완전 초 귀엽다고요!

shidenmissorka3ED_70.english: Shiden-san, if you were a gyaru in a moment like this, you would look at yourself and say... 'Kyaa~! Aren't I seriously totally cute!?'
shidenmissorka3ED_70.korean: 손님, 이럴 때 갸루라면 자기 모습을 보고… '꺄하~! 나 진짜 완전 귀엽지 않아!?' 하고 말하는 거예요!

shidenmissorka3ED_72.english: That's right! That's how you really boost your own energy! I mean, there are hardly any gyaru who don't think of themselves as cute.
shidenmissorka3ED_72.korean: 그렇죠! 그렇게 스스로 텐션을 확 끌어올리는 거예요! 랄까, 갸루인 자기 자신을 안 귀엽다고 생각하는 갸루는 없거든요.

shidenmissorka3ED_73.english: Come on! Affirm everything about yourself! You're totally cute!
shidenmissorka3ED_73.korean: 자! 자신을 긍정적으로 생각해 봐요! '난 완전 귀엽다'라고요!

shidenmissorka3ED_76.english: Then let's take a commemorative photo!

shidenmissorka3ED_77.english: Are you saying you're taking a picture for something like this!?
shidenmissorka3ED_77.korean: 겨우 이런 일로 사진까지 찍는단 말이오!?

shidenmissorka3ED_78.english: A Gyaru takes photos anytime, anywhere! I'm telling you, if you become a real Gyaru, you even take a picture to celebrate the end of a battle!
shidenmissorka3ED_78.korean: 갸루는 언제 어디서나 셀카를 찍는 법이에요! 진짜 갸루가 되면 전투가 끝난 기념으로도 찍는다니까요!

shidenmissorka3ED_8.english: Won't you turn me into a true gyaru!
shidenmissorka3ED_8.korean: 이 몸을 진정한 갸루로 만들어 주지 않겠소!

shidenmissorka3ED_82.english: Now, everyone, make a cute face!
shidenmissorka3ED_82.korean: 자~ 다들 귀여운 표정 지어 보세요~!

shidenmissorka3ED_85.english: So, what do you think? Isn't it super cute!

shidenmissorka3ED_87.english: Shiden, if you're a gyaru even in a situation like this

shidenmissorka3ED_88.english: "He says, 'Wow! It came out totally well, don't I look the cutest!?'"
shidenmissorka3ED_88.korean: '헐! 완전 잘 나왔는데, 나 최강으로 귀엽지 않아!?' 라고 말하는 거예요.

shidenmissorka3ED_92.english: Shiden, you don't need to be shy! It's true that you're cute!
shidenmissorka3ED_92.korean: 손님, 부끄러워하실 필요는 없어요! 귀여운 건 사실이니까요!

shidenmissorka3ED_95.english: H-Huh! It came out totally well, don't I look the cutest ever!?
shidenmissorka3ED_95.korean: 허, 헐! 완전 잘 나왔는데, 나 최강으로 귀엽지 않아!?

shidenmissorka3ED_97.english: I think I'm getting the hang of it...!

shidenmissorka3ED_98.english: … Huh? BoRyeon, it looks like you received a notification on your device?
shidenmissorka3ED_98.korean: …응? 보련, 그대 단말기에 알림이 온 듯하구려?

shidenmissorka3ED_99.english: It's true! It came from Orangeade.

shidenmissorka4ED_1.english: Ah! Here he is, here he is! I've been waiting for you, BoRyeon! Shiden!
shidenmissorka4ED_1.korean: 아! 오셨다, 오셨다! 기다리고 있었어요, 보련! 시덴 씨!

shidenmissorka4ED_10.english: We decided to gather as many gyaru as we could and hold a karaoke competition!
shidenmissorka4ED_10.korean: 갸루를 모을 수 있는 만큼 모아서, 노래방 대회를 열기로 했습니다!

shidenmissorka4ED_11.english: If you were surrounded by this many gyaru, wouldn't you end up being influenced by them whether you wanted to or not? Hehehe, come to think of it, I actually had a pretty good idea!
shidenmissorka4ED_11.korean:
이만큼의 갸루에게 둘러싸여 있으면, 싫어도 갸루에 물들 것 같지 않은가요?
에헤헤, 생각해 보니 저도 제법 좋은 생각을 했네요!

shidenmissorka4ED_12.english: Even so, isn't that a bit too simple...? Everyone must be busy...
shidenmissorka4ED_12.korean:
아무리 그래도 너무 지나친 것 아니오…?
다들 바쁠 터인데…

shidenmissorka4ED_14.english: Karaoke… well, I wanted to practice a bit anyway…
shidenmissorka4ED_14.korean: 노래방… 뭐, 마침 연습도 좀 하고 싶었고……

shidenmissorka4ED_15.english: I guess I have no choice... This is the first time, right?

shidenmissorka4ED_16.english: Hey, wanna have a competition to see who gets the highest score?
shidenmissorka4ED_16.korean: 있지, 누가 제일 높은 점수를 내는지 대결할래?

shidenmissorka4ED_17.english: I'll do it! I'll do it! I'll let everyone hear cute Linty's secret song!
shidenmissorka4ED_17.korean: 할래! 할래! 귀여운 린티의 비장의 노래, 모두에게 들려줄게!

shidenmissorka4ED_18.english: Well, at least it won't be boring.

shidenmissorka4ED_19.english: See? I'm telling you, Gyaru loves karaoke! Plus, participation isn't mandatory! Rest assured!
shidenmissorka4ED_19.korean:
보세요? 갸루는 노래방을 좋아한다니까요!
게다가 강제로 참가시킨 것도 아니니까, 안심하세요!

shidenmissorka4ED_20.english: Hmm... being a gyaru is really difficult...

shidenmissorka4ED_21.english: I'm sorry for the delay. It took a little time because of the dress code requirements.
shidenmissorka4ED_21.korean: 늦어서 미안하다. 지정한 복장을 찾느라 조금 시간이 걸렸다.

shidenmissorka4ED_22.english: But what is this call-up again?

shidenmissorka4ED_23.english: Everyone, do you want to sing~!?

shidenmissorka4ED_25.english: So then! The Orca Gyaru Karaoke Contest is here!
shidenmissorka4ED_25.korean: 그럼! 오르카 갸루 노래방 대회, 개최입니~다!

shidenmissorka4ED_27.english: Khan… You don’t have to force yourself to participate.

shidenmissorka4ED_28.english: … No, since it’s a rare occasion, I’ll join in too.

shidenmissorka4ED_29.english: Is that so... I feel a bit sorry for some reason.

shidenmissorka4ED_30.english: I found it good to participate in things like this once in a while.
shidenmissorka4ED_30.korean: 가끔은 이런 일도 생기는 게 좋더군.

shidenmissorka4ED_31.english: Besides… it seems like there’s some kind of reason behind it.

shidenmissorka4ED_34.english: Well, if you don't mind, let me hear it later.

shidenmissorka4ED_38.english: That outfit… suits you well. You’re, you’re cute.
shidenmissorka4ED_38.korean: 그 복장… 잘 어울리는구려. 귀, 귀엽소.

shidenmissorka4ED_4.english: They told us to gather at the game center wearing school uniforms, so I came... but what is this...?
shidenmissorka4ED_4.korean: 교복 입고 게임센터로 모이라길래 왔는데… 이게 뭐야…?

shidenmissorka4ED_40.english: Thank you. I think you're cute too, Shiden.

shidenmissorka4ED_42.english: Yay~! That was the super cute Linty's solo, 《LoverLover》~!
shidenmissorka4ED_42.korean: 예이~! 오르카에서 제일 귀여운 린티의 솔로, 《LoverLover》였습니다~!

shidenmissorka4ED_44.english: My voice just won't warm up, maybe because it's been a while… Should I order something to drink?
shidenmissorka4ED_44.korean: 오랜만이라 그런지 목이 안 풀리네… 뭔가 마실 거라도 주문할까?

shidenmissorka4ED_45.english: Oh, please take care of mine too~

shidenmissorka4ED_46.english: Hey there! Cute Linty just sang an amazing solo, and you don't have any thoughts!?
shidenmissorka4ED_46.korean: 거기! 귀여운 린티가 멋진 노래를 불렀는데, 감상은 없는 거야!?

shidenmissorka4ED_48.english: Are you practicing somewhere even on a regular basis? You must be busy with your missions.
shidenmissorka4ED_48.korean: 평소에도 연습하고 있는 것이오? 임무로 인해 바쁠 터인데.

shidenmissorka4ED_49.english: Hmm... I'm not really practicing. If I had to say, this is practice, right?
shidenmissorka4ED_49.korean: 으음… 딱히 연습은 안 하는데? 굳이 말하자면 지금이 연습이지?

shidenmissorka4ED_5.english: I was sleeping because it was my day off...
shidenmissorka4ED_5.korean: 칫, 나 쉬는 날이라 자고 있었는데…

shidenmissorka4ED_50.english: Hmm, if this is practice, when on earth is the actual broadcast?
shidenmissorka4ED_50.korean: 흠, 지금이 연습이라면 본방은 대체 언제인 것이오?

shidenmissorka4ED_51.english: I guess the actual broadcast will be that one...? When you tell it to the Commander?
shidenmissorka4ED_51.korean: 본방은 역시 그거 아닐까…? 사령관한테 들려줄 때?

shidenmissorka4ED_53.english: You want to give the person you like the impression that you sing well, and doesn't it feel like your cuteness somehow increases when you sing?
shidenmissorka4ED_53.korean: 좋아하는 사람에게 노래를 잘 부른다는 인상을 주고 싶고, 노래할 때는 왠지 더 귀여워지는 것 같지 않은가요?

shidenmissorka4ED_55.english: Before the apocalypse, there was even a tactic where both men and women would let out a cool voice to take down their target!
shidenmissorka4ED_55.korean: 멸망 전에는 남녀 가릴 것 없이 멋진 노래를 들려줘서, 노리고 있는 상대를 넘어뜨리는 연애법도 있었다니까요!

shidenmissorka4ED_56.english: In fact, there are many who have firmly captured the Commander's heart like that!
shidenmissorka4ED_56.korean: 실제로 그렇게 사령관님의 마음을 단단히 붙잡은 분도 많답니다!

shidenmissorka4ED_57.english: If Shiden plays a song he has been saving for the Commander, the Commander will surely fall for him with a flutter in his heart!
shidenmissorka4ED_57.korean: 시덴 씨도 아껴둔 곡을 사령관님께 들려드리세요! 그럼 사령관님도 분명 시덴 씨에게 빠지실 거예요!

shidenmissorka4ED_58.english: However, the only thing I can confidently sing is a lullaby...
shidenmissorka4ED_58.korean: 허나 이 몸이 자신 있게 부를 수 있는 노래는 자장가 정도뿐이라…

shidenmissorka4ED_59.english: So, that's why I'm practicing singing at the karaoke!
shidenmissorka4ED_59.korean: 그. 러. 니. 까, 노래방에서 노래 연습을 하는 거예요!

shidenmissorka4ED_6.english: I heard Orange said she wanted to see Linty dressed as a cute gyaru...
shidenmissorka4ED_6.korean: 오렌지한테 귀여운 갸루 차림의 린티를 보고 싶다고 들었는데…

shidenmissorka4ED_62.english: Let's try singing something together just to test it out! I wonder what would be good~
shidenmissorka4ED_62.korean:
시험 삼아 저랑 같이 하나 불러 보죠!
뭐가 좋으려나~

shidenmissorka4ED_63.english: Ah, look at this! The songs around here aren't from before the apocalypse; they are songs that someone in Orca asked Muse to create for them because they wanted to convey their feelings to the Commander!
shidenmissorka4ED_63.korean: 아, 이것 보세요! 이 곡들은 멸망 전의 노래가 아니라, 오르카의 누군가가 사령관님께 마음을 전하고 싶어서 뮤즈에게 부탁해 만들어 달라고 한 곡들이에요!

shidenmissorka4ED_64.english: That is remarkable. After all, the Muse was famous even before its demise.
shidenmissorka4ED_64.korean: 대단하구려. 뮤즈는 멸망 전에도 유명했으니 말이오.

shidenmissorka4ED_66.english: Shiden!! This is it, this is it! Let's go with this!

shidenmissorka4ED_67.english: I'm surprised... What do you mean by this? What do you mean...?
shidenmissorka4ED_67.korean: 깜짝 놀랐구려… 그거라니? 그게 무슨 말이오…?

shidenmissorka4ED_68.english: I'm asking Ms. Muse to make a song for me!
shidenmissorka4ED_68.korean: 뮤즈 씨한테 노래를 만들어 달라고 하는 거예요!

shidenmissorka4ED_69.english: And then, become a proper gyaru, invite them to karaoke, and express your feelings with an original song…
shidenmissorka4ED_69.korean: 그리고 제대로 된 갸루가 돼서, 오빠를 노래방에 초대하고, 오리지널 곡으로 마음을 전하는 거죠.

shidenmissorka4ED_7.english: The message was suspicious, but… what kind of event is this…?
shidenmissorka4ED_7.korean: 메시지가 수상하긴 했지만… 이건 또 무슨 행사야…?

shidenmissorka4ED_71.english: The costumes will take time, and I have to come up with and receive the song, so in the meantime, I'm practicing singing with Gyaru Suyeon!
shidenmissorka4ED_71.korean: 의상도 시간이 걸릴 테고, 노래도 받아야 하니까... 그동안 갸루 수련이랑 노래 연습을 같이 하는 거예요!

shidenmissorka4ED_72.english: Are you saying that with that, I can move a little further forward with that brat...?
shidenmissorka4ED_72.korean: 그걸로 애송이와 좀 더 친밀해질 수 있단 말이오…?

shidenmissorka4ED_73.english: Of course! Just becoming a true Gyaru is enough to make me the best, so there's no way I won't succeed!
shidenmissorka4ED_73.korean: 물론이죠! 진정한 갸루가 된 것만으로도 최강인데, 이걸로 성공하지 않을 리가 없어요!

shidenmissorka4ED_74.english: Right... a ninja knows how to do anything to win...
shidenmissorka4ED_74.korean: 그래… 닌자란 이기기 위해서라면 무엇이든 하는 법…

shidenmissorka4ED_75.english: And I am the founder of the Murasaki-ryu. It is only natural to delve into whatever comes my way to the extreme.
shidenmissorka4ED_75.korean:
그리고 이 몸은 무라사키류의 시조.
어떤 일이든 극한까지 파고드는 것은 당연한 일이지.

shidenmissorka4ED_76.english: I'll give it a try!! BoRyeon! Please guide me harshly until I become a true Gyaru!!
shidenmissorka4ED_76.korean:
해 보겠소!!
보련! 이 몸이 진정한 갸루가 될 때까지, 혹독하게 지도해 주시오!!

shidenmissorka4ED_8.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like it's going to be interesting.

shidenmissorka4ED_80.english: Excellent… Another perfect gyaru has been born in Orca.
shidenmissorka4ED_80.korean:
엑설런트…
오르카에 또 한 명의 퍼펙트한 갸루가 탄생했군요.

shidenmissorka4ED_81.english: Thank you so much for both of them… They turned out really well, and they're totally cute…
shidenmissorka4ED_81.korean:
둘 다 진짜 고마워…
의상도 엄청 잘 나왔고, 시덴 완전 귀엽잖아…

shidenmissorka4ED_82.english: Your way of speaking is perfect, too! Anyone can tell now that you're a total gyaru!
shidenmissorka4ED_82.korean:
말투도 완벽하네요!
이젠 누가 봐도 완전 갸루예요!

shidenmissorka4ED_83.english: If it weren't for BoRyeon and Teacher Audrey, things wouldn't have changed this much... Thank you so much...
shidenmissorka4ED_83.korean:
보련이랑 오드리가 없었으면 이렇게까지 바뀌지 못했을 거야…
모두 너희들 덕분이야!

shidenmissorka4ED_84.english: We just gave you a little push.
shidenmissorka4ED_84.korean: 놉~! 우리는 그저 조금 등을 떠밀어 드렸을 뿐이에요.

shidenmissorka4ED_85.english: The reason he was able to change to that extent was ultimately because of his own will.
shidenmissorka4ED_85.korean: 이 정도까지 변할 수 있었던 건, 결국 본인의 의지가 강했기 때문이죠.

shidenmissorka4ED_86.english: Besides, above all, we had fun too! No problem!

shidenmissorka4ED_87.english: Yeah. I had a lot of fun too.

shidenmissorka4ED_88.english: Ugh... just looking at myself is making my tension skyrocket!
shidenmissorka4ED_88.korean: 으으… 시덴 모습 보고 있으니까~ 텐션이 막 올라와~!

shidenmissorka4ED_89.english: I feel like I can do anything right now! Gyaru is the best!
shidenmissorka4ED_89.korean: 지금이라면 뭐든 할 수 있을 것 같아! 갸루, 최고야!

shidenmissorka4ED_9.english: You know, when you think of Gyaru, you think of karaoke! So!

shidenmissorka4ED_93.english: Going on a date with Darling!

shidenmissorka5ED_10.english: When I arrived in front of the fountain in the commercial district, the designated meeting place…
shidenmissorka5ED_10.korean: - 약속 장소로 정한 상업 구역의 분수대 앞에 가 보니……

shidenmissorka5ED_101.english: You haven't changed since we first met...
shidenmissorka5ED_101.korean: 처음 만났을 때와 전혀 변하지 않았어…

shidenmissorka5ED_103.english: Shiden let out a deep sigh as if he had made a decision.
shidenmissorka5ED_103.korean: - 시덴은 뭔가 결심한 듯 크게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_104.english: You know, there is a reason I am dressed like this today.
shidenmissorka5ED_104.korean: 있지, 오늘 이런 차림을 한 데에는 이유가 있어.

shidenmissorka5ED_105.english: Look, you know the image of a gyaru is honest, free, and... doing whatever they want?
shidenmissorka5ED_105.korean: 봐, 갸루란 솔직하고 자유롭고…… 하고 싶은 걸 하는 이미지잖아?

shidenmissorka5ED_106.english: So, I was wondering if I could... um... invite them on a date like this...
shidenmissorka5ED_106.korean: 그래서 갸루가 되면… 그… 이렇게 데이트를 할 수 있으려나 싶어서…

shidenmissorka5ED_107.english: Ahaha... For now, the plan succeeded. Finally, the atmosphere is right for the two of us to talk like this...
shidenmissorka5ED_107.korean:
아하하… 일단 작전은 성공.
드디어 이렇게 둘이서 이야기할 수 있는 분위기도 됐네…

shidenmissorka5ED_110.english: I asked you earlier if you practiced singing, remember?

shidenmissorka5ED_111.english: Yeah... I did. And as for the song... I asked Muse to make it for me.
shidenmissorka5ED_111.korean:
응… 했어.
그리고 노래를 말이야. 뮤즈한테 만들어 달라고 했어.

shidenmissorka5ED_112.english: Saying that, Shiden operated the terminal and played a song.
shidenmissorka5ED_112.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 시덴은 단말기를 조작해 곡을 틀었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_113.english: can't really convey it in words, so I hope you'll listen to my song.
shidenmissorka5ED_113.korean: 대화로는 잘 전달할 수 없으니까, 내 노래를 들어줬으면 해.

shidenmissorka5ED_114.english: Then, a song started playing from the speakers.

shidenmissorka5ED_115.english: - That song was very uptempo, and it really had that 'gyaru' vibe... The lyrics, filled with all sorts of feelings for someone, were very lovely.
shidenmissorka5ED_115.korean: - 그 노래는 무척 빠르고 발랄해서, 그야말로 갸루라는 느낌의 곡이었고… 누군가를 좋아하는 마음을 가득 눌러 담은 가사가 무척 사랑스러웠다.

shidenmissorka5ED_116.english: Shiden blushed a little as if embarrassed, but looked straight at me and sang earnestly.
shidenmissorka5ED_116.korean: - 시덴은 부끄러운 듯이 얼굴을 붉히면서도, 나를 똑바로 바라보며 진지하게 노래해 주었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_117.english: As the song ended, Shiden let out a deep sigh as if he had poured out everything.
shidenmissorka5ED_117.korean: - 곡이 끝나자 시덴은 모든 걸 쏟아낸 듯, 크게 숨을 내쉬었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_120.english: From here on, I won't speak as a gyaru, but as my usual self.
shidenmissorka5ED_120.korean: 지금부터는 갸루가 아니라, 평소의 나로서 말할게.

shidenmissorka5ED_121.english: This is the mind of this body.
shidenmissorka5ED_121.korean: 이것이 바로 이 몸의 진실한 마음이오.

shidenmissorka5ED_122.english: Ever since we first met in Hokkaido, you have always been kind.
shidenmissorka5ED_122.korean: 홋카이도에서 처음 만났을 때부터, 그대는 줄곧 상냥했소.

shidenmissorka5ED_123.english: He visited me time and time again when I was being stubborn, and tried to save me without suppressing me with orders.
shidenmissorka5ED_123.korean: 고집만 부리며 그대를 외면하던 이 몸을 몇 번이나 찾아와 주었고, 명령으로 강제하지 않고 설득하려 했지.

shidenmissorka5ED_124.english: It was the same even after coming to Orca. It was always conveyed that I was cherished.
shidenmissorka5ED_124.korean:
오르카에 합류한 뒤에도 마찬가지였소.​
이 몸을 소중히 여기고 있는 그대의 마음이 늘 전해졌소.

shidenmissorka5ED_125.english: never imagined you would be holding back from touching your tail. Hehe......
shidenmissorka5ED_125.korean: 설마, 내 꼬리를 탐내는 걸 참고 있었을 줄까지는 몰랐지만. 후후......

shidenmissorka5ED_126.english: So... what was it... from now on... it is okay... to... touch... the tail...

shidenmissorka5ED_127.english: Ah... really!! I like you enough to let me touch you......! That means you can do whatever you want!!
shidenmissorka5ED_127.korean: 아앗... 정말이지!! 마구 만져도 괜찮을 정도로 널 좋아하니까......! 마음대로 해도 된다고!!

shidenmissorka5ED_128.english: You... you don't like it...? Wasn't that what you meant?

shidenmissorka5ED_129.english: Ugh...... Heh...... This is so embarrassing...... This...... It’s the first time I’ve ever conveyed these feelings to someone, and to think it’s actually happening......
shidenmissorka5ED_129.korean:
윽...... 큭...... 너, 너무 부끄럽잖아~! 이건......
좋아하는 사람에게 솔직한 마음을 전하는 건 처음이고, 그게 이루어지다니......!

shidenmissorka5ED_130.english: Ah... my way of speaking is such a mess that I don't even know what's what anymore...
shidenmissorka5ED_130.korean: 으아아...... 말투도 엉망진창이라서, 이제 뭐가 뭔지도 모르겠어......

shidenmissorka5ED_132.english: Shiden stuck out his tail at me with a flushed face.
shidenmissorka5ED_132.korean: - 시덴은 상기된 얼굴로 내게 꼬리를 내밀었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_136.english: As we were resting, the dedicated panel in the room rang.
shidenmissorka5ED_136.korean: - 우리가 쉬고 있는 방의 전용 패널이 울렸다.

shidenmissorka5ED_137.english: Shiden, who was closer to the panel than me, was slumped on the sofa with a melted… no, a happy-looking face.
shidenmissorka5ED_137.korean: - 패널 가까이에 있는 시덴은 녹아내린… 아니, 행복해 보이는 얼굴로 소파에 축 늘어져 있었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_138.english: I sat up, operated the panel, and answered the call.
shidenmissorka5ED_138.korean: - 나는 어쩔 수 없이 몸을 일으켜서 패널을 조작했다.

shidenmissorka5ED_139.english: Ah, is that you, Commander? Um... time is running out... Are you planning to extend it?
shidenmissorka5ED_139.korean: 아, 사령관님이신가요? 저기… 슬슬 시간이 다 되어 가는데요… 연장하실 건가요?

shidenmissorka5ED_14.english: Shiden covered his mouth with his hand and fidgeted, his face flushed bright red.
shidenmissorka5ED_14.korean: - 시덴은 손으로 입을 가리고, 얼굴을 새빨갛게 붉힌 채 꼼지락거렸다.

shidenmissorka5ED_140.english: As I glanced at Shiden out of the corner of my eye…

shidenmissorka5ED_142.english: Shiden was slumped over, but he was wagging his tail and sending me a seductive smile.
shidenmissorka5ED_142.korean: - 시덴은 축 늘어진 채였지만, 긴 꼬리를 살랑살랑 흔들며 내게 요염한 미소를 보냈다.

shidenmissorka5ED_146.english: I would appreciate it if you could restrain yourselves a little... A crowd of onlookers has gathered in front of the door, and it's a big problem...
shidenmissorka5ED_146.korean:
조금만 자제해 주시면 감사하겠습니다…
문 앞에 구경꾼이 몰려버려서 난감했거든요…

shidenmissorka5ED_147.english: suddenly looked toward the door and made eye contact with a team member on the other side of the glass.
shidenmissorka5ED_147.korean: - 문득 문가를 보니, 유리 너머로 한 대원과 눈이 마주쳤다.

shidenmissorka5ED_150.english: You are truly extraordinary. I never imagined I would lose consciousness.
shidenmissorka5ED_150.korean: 그대, 정말 절륜하구려. 설마 이 몸이 정신까지 잃을 줄은 몰랐소.

shidenmissorka5ED_151.english: Certainly, the eyes when touching the tail were really like a tiger's.
shidenmissorka5ED_151.korean: 확실히, 꼬리를 만질 때의 안광은 정말 호랑이 같았소.

shidenmissorka5ED_153.english: Please don't say such embarrassing things...

shidenmissorka5ED_154.english: Huh? Well… that’s true. The reason I tried to become a gyaru was to bridge the distance between me and you…
shidenmissorka5ED_154.korean:
응? 뭐… 그렇지.
갸루가 되어 보려 한 건 그대와의 거리를 좁히고 싶어서였으니…

shidenmissorka5ED_155.english: I think it would be fine to return to my original body now, but...
shidenmissorka5ED_155.korean: 이제는 원래의 몸으로 돌아와도 괜찮겠다 싶다만…

shidenmissorka5ED_156.english: So, how is it? Did you like the Gyaru side better?

shidenmissorka5ED_158.english: Indeed, you have a knack for charming people...
shidenmissorka5ED_158.korean: 정말, 그대는 사람 홀리는 재주가 있구려…

shidenmissorka5ED_159.english: Hehe! Well, was being a gyaru fun for me too? Maybe I should switch things up depending on my mood from now on~?
shidenmissorka5ED_159.korean:
후후! 뭐, 이 몸도 갸루는 재미있었으니.
앞으로는 기분 따라 바꿔 볼까나~?

shidenmissorka5ED_16.english: It's fine! I just misspoke a little!
shidenmissorka5ED_16.korean: 괜찮거든! 그냥 말이 조금 헛나왔을 뿐이야!

shidenmissorka5ED_160.english: Then… I’ll stay a gyaru for today!
shidenmissorka5ED_160.korean: 그럼… 오늘은 계속 갸루로 있어 줄게!

shidenmissorka5ED_161.english: Shiden showed his teeth and smiled cutely.

shidenmissorka5ED_162.english: Oh, right! Photos! I haven't taken any photos today yet!
shidenmissorka5ED_162.korean: 아, 맞다! 사진! 오늘 아직 사진 안 찍었잖아!

shidenmissorka5ED_163.english: Yeah, when you think of Gyaru, you think of photos! Since I came to karaoke with my boyfriend, I have to take a commemorative photo!
shidenmissorka5ED_163.korean:
응, 갸루 하면 사진이잖아!
남자친구랑 노래방에 왔으니, 기념으로 찍어야지!

shidenmissorka5ED_165.english: Shiden held the smartphone in one hand and pulled me close with the other.
shidenmissorka5ED_165.korean: - 시덴은 한 손으로 스마트폰을 들고, 다른 손으로 나를 확 끌어당겼다.

shidenmissorka5ED_168.english: Wow! It turned out super well!!

shidenmissorka5ED_17.english: (Your tone of voice is different from usual!?)

shidenmissorka5ED_179.english: It's been quite a while since you came to Orca, so I thought you'd know everything.
shidenmissorka5ED_179.korean: 오르카에 온 지도 꽤 됐으니까, 다 가봤을 줄 알았어.

shidenmissorka5ED_18.english: What's with that reaction... or rather, isn't there something you should have said first?
shidenmissorka5ED_18.korean:
뭐야, 그 반응…
이랄까, 먼저 해야 할 말이 있는 거 아냐?

shidenmissorka5ED_180.english: That's a relief. It's certainly sparkling here.
shidenmissorka5ED_180.korean: 그래? 확실히 여긴 눈부실 정도로 밝긴 하지.

shidenmissorka5ED_181.english: Yeah, I'll do my best. I have no intention of stopping here, either.
shidenmissorka5ED_181.korean: 더 열심히 할게. 나는 겨우 이 정도로 만족할 생각은 없거든.

shidenmissorka5ED_184.english: No, it's just the first time Shiden has said that to me...
shidenmissorka5ED_184.korean: 아니, 시덴이 이렇게까지 칭찬해 준 건 처음이라서…

shidenmissorka5ED_185.english: Yeah. I'm glad I was able to buy exactly what I wanted.
shidenmissorka5ED_185.korean: 응. 딱 사고 싶었던 게 있었는데, 살 수 있어서 다행이야.

shidenmissorka5ED_189.english: Come to think of it... it's already a little past lunchtime.

shidenmissorka5ED_19.english: I have something to say... I definitely have something to say. I do, but this time there is so much that I honestly don't know where to start...
shidenmissorka5ED_19.korean: - 할 말…… 확실히 할 말은 있다. 있긴 한데, 너무 많아서 뭐부터 말해야 할지 솔직히 모르겠다……

shidenmissorka5ED_190.english: Shall we go to a cafe?

shidenmissorka5ED_191.english: Is this a karaoke bar... It really feels like a gyaru.
shidenmissorka5ED_191.korean: 노래방인가… 진짜 갸루 같다는 느낌이 드네.

shidenmissorka5ED_194.english: Because I thought it was cute.

shidenmissorka5ED_196.english: You said you liked this room.

shidenmissorka5ED_2.english: I finished the work I had to complete early in the morning and drank the coffee Constanta brewed for me.
shidenmissorka5ED_2.korean: - 나는 아침 일찍 끝내야 했던 업무를 처리하고, 콘스탄차가 내려 준 커피를 마셨다.

shidenmissorka5ED_204.english: No, well... I did try not to be conscious of it...
shidenmissorka5ED_204.korean: 아니, 뭐… 의식하지 않으려고 하긴 했어…

shidenmissorka5ED_205.english: … I said I hate humans, but I have no intention of doing the same thing.
shidenmissorka5ED_205.korean: …인간을 미워한다고 했는데, 똑같은 짓을 할 생각은 없어.

shidenmissorka5ED_211.english: No. It's not like that. I'm happy.

shidenmissorka5ED_213.english: Hehe, all versions of Shiden are adorable

shidenmissorka5ED_223.english: Haha… Sorry. I just really like the tail…
shidenmissorka5ED_223.korean: 하하… 미안. 시덴의 꼬리가 너무 좋아서…

shidenmissorka5ED_224.english: It seems like even Shiden liked being held by the tail and getting beaten up, though?
shidenmissorka5ED_224.korean: 그런 시덴도 꼬리를 붙잡힌 채 하는 걸 좋아했던 것 같은데?

shidenmissorka5ED_225.english: More importantly, your way of speaking is back to normal?

shidenmissorka5ED_226.english: Either Shiden is fine, but Gyaru is fresh...
shidenmissorka5ED_226.korean: 어느 쪽의 시덴이든 좋지만, 갸루는 신선하더라고…

shidenmissorka5ED_23.english: Right! I really dressed up! Aren't I the cutest?
shidenmissorka5ED_23.korean: 그치! 완전 빡세게 꾸미고 왔거든! 최고로 귀엽지 않아?

shidenmissorka5ED_24.english: Today, I'm the ultimate gyaru, so get ready!
shidenmissorka5ED_24.korean: 오늘의 시덴은 최강의 갸루니까, 각오해 둬!

shidenmissorka5ED_25.english: Shiden winked with a lovely smile.

shidenmissorka5ED_26.english: Then let's go look around the shop first!

shidenmissorka5ED_27.english: Actually, there are so many shops I haven't been to yet.
shidenmissorka5ED_27.korean: 사실 아직 들어가 본 적 없는 가게가 엄청 많거든.

shidenmissorka5ED_28.english: Hmm, so far I've only gone out to buy things I needed~ Sumire and Hatsuna always bought tons of useless stuff...
shidenmissorka5ED_28.korean:
음, 지금까진 필요한 물건만 사러 다녔거든~
쓸데없는 건 스미레랑 하츠나가 늘 잔뜩 사 왔었고……

shidenmissorka5ED_29.english: But now I’ve become interested in things like clothes and accessories. Since it’s a date for the first time in a while, I wanted to go there.
shidenmissorka5ED_29.korean:
근데 지금은 옷이나 소품 같은 게 관심 있단 말이지.
모처럼의 데이트니까, 한번 가 보고 싶었어.

shidenmissorka5ED_3.english: There is nothing left to do now. It is a complete break.
shidenmissorka5ED_3.korean: - 이제 남은 일은 없다. 완전한 오프다.

shidenmissorka5ED_30.english: Come to think of it, that's fascinating. The scenery here looks completely different from before, too.
shidenmissorka5ED_30.korean: 그러고 보니 신기하네. 여기 풍경도 전이랑 다르게 보여.

shidenmissorka5ED_32.english: Yeah, right. If you look only at this part, that war of destruction looks like a lie.
shidenmissorka5ED_32.korean:
그러게~
여기만 보면 멸망 전쟁이 다 거짓말 같아.

shidenmissorka5ED_33.english: The kids walking here are all smiling.
shidenmissorka5ED_33.korean: 여길 걷는 애들, 모두 웃고 있잖아.

shidenmissorka5ED_34.english: You… no, the Commander, you’ve really worked hard.
shidenmissorka5ED_34.korean: 너… 아니, 사령관은 정말 열심히 해 왔구나.

shidenmissorka5ED_35.english: Looking at this, I can sincerely believe that the Commander will save the world… and us.
shidenmissorka5ED_35.korean: 이 거리를 보고 있으면, 사령관이 세상을… 우리를 구해줄 거라고 진심으로 믿을 수 있어.

shidenmissorka5ED_36.english: Hehe, I like the part where you just speak your mind without any hesitation.
shidenmissorka5ED_36.korean: 후후, 그렇게 망설임 없이 똑 부러지게 말하는 부분이 좋아.

shidenmissorka5ED_38.english: I was surprised by how blunt Shiden was.
shidenmissorka5ED_38.korean: - 시덴이 너무 직설적으로 말해서 놀라고 말았다.

shidenmissorka5ED_4.english: No, actually, there was a mountain of work piled up, but I got caught handling it while pretending to play games, so it ended up being confiscated…
shidenmissorka5ED_4.korean: - 아니, 사실은 일이 산더미처럼 쌓여 있었지만, 내가 게임하는 척하며 일을 처리한 게 들통나 몰수당하고 말았다……

shidenmissorka5ED_41.english: Don't worry about every single thing like that; just accept it honestly!
shidenmissorka5ED_41.korean: 그런 걸 일일이 신경 쓰지 마! 그냥 솔직하게 받아들이면 되는 거야!

shidenmissorka5ED_42.english: Alright, I'm going into the store!

shidenmissorka5ED_43.english: We took our time looking around several shops.
shidenmissorka5ED_43.korean: - 우리는 여러 가게를 둘러보며 시간을 보냈다.

shidenmissorka5ED_44.english: Phew, I bought quite a lot~

shidenmissorka5ED_45.english: You mean the gaming controller? Didn't you already have one?
shidenmissorka5ED_45.korean: 게임용 컨트롤러 말이지? 사령관, 원래 갖고 있지 않았어?

shidenmissorka5ED_46.english: Huh? Because you played too many games?
shidenmissorka5ED_46.korean: 엣? 설마 게임 너무 많이 해서?

shidenmissorka5ED_47.english: … I understand everything with just that one word…
shidenmissorka5ED_47.korean: …그 한마디로 어떻게 된 건지 다 알겠네.

shidenmissorka5ED_48.english: Is that why you suddenly got the day off today?
shidenmissorka5ED_48.korean: 오늘 갑자기 오프가 된 것도 그것 때문이야?

shidenmissorka5ED_49.english: Well, thanks to you, I was able to ask you out on a date, so I won't nag you that much this time.
shidenmissorka5ED_49.korean: 뭐, 그 덕분에 시덴이 데이트 신청을 할 수 있었으니까 잔소리하진 않을게.

shidenmissorka5ED_5.english: I thought working with a game controller was a pretty good idea, too...
shidenmissorka5ED_5.korean: - 게임용 컨트롤러로 일을 하는 건 내 생각에도 제법 괜찮은 아이디어였는데……

shidenmissorka5ED_50.english: Oh, come to think of it, aren't you getting hungry?
shidenmissorka5ED_50.korean: 아, 그러고 보니 슬슬 배고프지 않아?

shidenmissorka5ED_51.english: No. Let's go to karaoke right now.

shidenmissorka5ED_52.english: karaoke place recently opened in this area, too. I heard the food menu is really good, too.
shidenmissorka5ED_52.korean:
최근 이 구역에도 노래방이 생겼거든.
요리 메뉴도 엄청나게 잘 되어 있대.

shidenmissorka5ED_54.english: Right! We practiced the song, so let's sing it a lot!!

shidenmissorka5ED_57.english: You just thought, "You've been practicing for today," right?
shidenmissorka5ED_57.korean: 방금, 오늘을 위해 연습했구나, 같은 생각 했지?

shidenmissorka5ED_58.english: Lies! It was all written on your face!

shidenmissorka5ED_59.english: Even as he said that, Shiden's face grew increasingly red. It seemed that was the right answer after all.
shidenmissorka5ED_59.korean: - 그렇게 말하면서도 시덴의 얼굴은 점점 새빨개져 갔다. 아무래도 정답이었던 모양이다.

shidenmissorka5ED_6.english: So, today was forcibly taken off, and the schedule after that is none other than a date with Shiden.
shidenmissorka5ED_6.korean: - 그렇게 해서 오늘은 강제로 오프가 되었고, 이후 일정은 무려 시덴과의 데이트다.

shidenmissorka5ED_62.english: Don't surprise me! It's bad for my heart!
shidenmissorka5ED_62.korean: 기습은 하지 말거라! 심장에 안 좋단 말이다!

shidenmissorka5ED_63.english: Ah, seriously! My face is totally ruined!!

shidenmissorka5ED_65.english: And we headed to the newly opened karaoke place and finished the registration.
shidenmissorka5ED_65.korean: - 그리고 우리는 새로 생겼다는 노래방으로 향했다.

shidenmissorka5ED_69.english: A room that literally felt 'cute' unfolded before my eyes.
shidenmissorka5ED_69.korean: - 말 그대로 ‘귀엽다’는 느낌의 방이 눈앞에 펼쳐졌다.

shidenmissorka5ED_7.english: Honestly, I was surprised when the invitation message arrived, but I was so happy to think that she, who used to hate humans so much, had gotten used to me.
shidenmissorka5ED_7.korean: - 솔직히 초대 메시지가 왔을 때는 놀랐지만, 그토록 인간을 증오하던 그녀가 먼저 내게 손을 내밀어 주었다고 생각하니 너무 기뻤다.

shidenmissorka5ED_70.english: I'm telling you! My tension is rising!

shidenmissorka5ED_71.english: I mean, the room is really spacious! Even though there are only two of us! Hahaha!
shidenmissorka5ED_71.korean: 랄까, 방 진짜 넓어! 우리 둘뿐인데! 아하하!

shidenmissorka5ED_72.english: Yeah! This room was seriously super cute! You know how you want to go in when it's empty?
shidenmissorka5ED_72.korean:
응! 방이 진짜 엄청 귀엽단 말이야!
비어 있으면 들어가고 싶어지잖아?

shidenmissorka5ED_73.english: Now, now, sit down, sit down.

shidenmissorka5ED_74.english: I sat on the sofa as if drawn to Shiden, and Shiden sat right next to me.
shidenmissorka5ED_74.korean: - 나는 시덴에게 이끌리듯 소파에 앉았고, 시덴은 내 옆에 딱 달라붙듯 앉았다.

shidenmissorka5ED_77.english: Shiden was looking at the menu with a look of amusement, but his face was bright red.
shidenmissorka5ED_77.korean: - 시덴은 즐거운 듯 메뉴를 보고 있었지만, 얼굴은 새빨갰다.

shidenmissorka5ED_79.english: As I was looking at Shiden with those thoughts, I saw something twitching in a corner of my vision.
shidenmissorka5ED_79.korean: - 내가 그런 생각을 하며 시덴을 보고 있자, 시야 한구석에서 뭔가가 움찔움찔 움직이는 게 보였다.

shidenmissorka5ED_8.english: So I'm looking forward to it.

shidenmissorka5ED_81.english: And whether I liked it or not, that existence reminded me of the existence of a tail…
shidenmissorka5ED_81.korean: - 그리고 그 존재가 저절로 꼬리를 떠올리게 만들었다…

shidenmissorka5ED_84.english: As I lowered my gaze so as not to be seen by Shiden, the tail was wrapped around Shiden's waist.
shidenmissorka5ED_84.korean: - 시덴에게 들키지 않도록 시선을 아래로 내리자, 꼬리는 시덴의 허리에 감겨 있었다.

shidenmissorka5ED_86.english: (Ugh, no…! Today, Shiden is so proactive, cute, and feels like he’s gotten closer, so I feel like my self-control is going to crumble…!)
shidenmissorka5ED_86.korean: (큭, 안 돼…! 오늘은 시덴이 적극적이고, 귀엽고, 거리도 가까워진 것처럼 느껴져서 자제심이 무너질 것만 같다…!)

shidenmissorka5ED_88.english: What are you spacing out for? Here, pick something to eat. I've already chosen mine.
shidenmissorka5ED_88.korean:
뭘 멍하니 있어? 자, 먹을 거 골라.
시덴은 벌써 골랐으니까.

shidenmissorka5ED_89.english: (That was dangerous… If I had stayed just a little longer, I would have touched it…)

shidenmissorka5ED_90.english: I hurriedly pretended to order food and mumbled something, barely managing to regain my composure.
shidenmissorka5ED_90.korean: - 나는 황급히 음식을 주문하는 척하며 얼버무렸고, 간신히 이성을 되찾는 데 성공했다.

shidenmissorka5ED_92.english: I heard that Aurora supervised the cooking at this restaurant.

shidenmissorka5ED_95.english: I was watching the tail earlier.

shidenmissorka5ED_96.english: I heard it from War Wolf. They say you’re a tail addict who really, really loves tails?
shidenmissorka5ED_96.korean: 워울프한테 들었어. 사령관, 꼬리를 엄청 좋아하는 꼬리 중독자라면서?
